UPDATE npcCorporations SET description='A filthy rich corporation that disassociated itself from the Federation when it tried to encroach on the company''s riches. ORE operates mainly in the Outer Ring and Cloud Ring regions, where they have mining installations scattered around in hidden locations, grinding out the most valuable minerals on the market.' WHERE corporation_id=1000129;

UPDATE types SET description='The Standup Reprocessing Facility is a service module that allows the use of a reprocessing and compression facilities when installed into an Upwell technology structure. The default reprocessing rate is 50%, which may be further enhanced by the use of Standup rigs. Note that this facility does not enable compression of Harvestable Gas Clouds and Moon Asteroids, which is only possible using on board compression modules fitted to Industrial Command Ships and Capital Industrial Command Ships.'||X'0a0a'
||'While an Upwell Structure has at least one service module online, it will enter "full power" mode and gain significantly increased shield and armor hitpoints and an extra reinforcement cycle.'||X'0a0a'
||'Standup is a proprietary system that uses a Structure Autonomous Nanoassembly Device (Upwell) containing integrated template software, a nanoassembler array and sufficient nanomass to enable the construction of a variety of service modules, structure modules and structure rigs when inserted into the appropriate slots on a structure built with Upwell technology.' WHERE type_id=35899;
UPDATE types SET gun_slot=3 WHERE type_id=37456;
UPDATE types SET description='This module spools up and then teleports the user and up to 24 nearby ships along with all drones, fighters, probes and bombs 100km in the direction the ship is facing. All ships teleported will retain their movement direction and velocity in the new location.'||X'0a0a'
||'Note: The micro jump field only affects capsuleer-piloted ships and will not move certain ship types, including; Capital Ships, Freighters, and Industrial Command Ships.' WHERE type_id=37479;

UPDATE types SET description='<font size="14"><b>Enforcer Expert System </b></font>'||X'0a0a'
||'This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly various T1 Destroyers.'||X'0a0a'
||'<b>The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for 7 days.</b>'||X'0a0a'
||'An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.'||X'0a0a'
||'<font size="14"><b>Activating an Expert System</b></font>'||X'0a0a'
||'Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.'||X'0a0a'
||'<i>Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar''s HyperNet.</i>' WHERE type_id=87492;
UPDATE types SET description='<font size="14"><b>Soldier of Fortune Expert System</b></font>'||X'0a0a'
||'This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly various T1 Cruisers.'||X'0a0a'
||'<b>The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for 7 days.</b>'||X'0a0a'
||'An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.'||X'0a0a'
||'<font size="14"><b>Activating an Expert System</b></font>'||X'0a0a'
||'Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.'||X'0a0a'
||'<i>Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar''s HyperNet.</i>' WHERE type_id=87494;
UPDATE types SET description='<font size="14"><b>Explorer Expert System</b></font>'||X'0a0a'
||'This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly an exploration Frigate fitted with basic travel, scanning and hacking equipment. It does not include the Cloaking skill and is therefore best suited for exploration of High Security space.'||X'0a0a'
||'<b>The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for 7 days.</b>'||X'0a0a'
||'An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.'||X'0a0a'
||'<font size="14"><b>Activating an Expert System</b></font>'||X'0a0a'
||'Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.'||X'0a0a'
||'<i>Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar''s HyperNet.</i>' WHERE type_id=87496;
UPDATE types SET description='<font size="14"><b>Industrialist Expert System</b></font>'||X'0a0a'
||'This Expert System makes available skills enabling the Capsuleer to fly a Mining Barge, such as a Covetor, and to use the Strip Miner I and Ice Harvest I modules. It also grants you access to manufacturing skills.'||X'0a0a'
||'<b>The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for 7 days.</b>'||X'0a0a'
||'An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.'||X'0a0a'
||'<font size="14"><b>Activating an Expert System</b></font>'||X'0a0a'
||'Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.'||X'0a0a'
||'<i>Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar''s HyperNet.</i>' WHERE type_id=87500;
UPDATE types SET description='This crate contains a random Capsuleer Day XXIII Glamourex Booster.' WHERE type_id=87925;
UPDATE types SET description='A combination of additional fighter hangar support drones, fighter power transmitters and advanced sensor support, the Fighter Support Unit assist all areas of fighter operation.'||X'0a0a'
||'Note: Can only be fit to Carriers, Command Carriers and Supercarriers.'||X'0a'
||'Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship or fighter squadron will be penalized.' WHERE type_id=88264;

UPDATE types SET description='This bioadaptive mutaplasmid interface is designed to alter the functional output and performance of modulated strip miners.'||X'0a0a'
||'Triglavian bioadaptive technology makes extensive use of engineered colonies of extremophilic bacteria, that are used to grow, harvest and adapt various resources found in Abyssal Deadspace. Artificial colonizing plasmids integrated into specialist tools used for direct adaptation of technology can be found in Triglavian caches in various stages of development. These mutaplasmids can be used to alter the characteristics of a wide variety of equipment types, depending on the strain and the bioadaptive tool with which they are integrated.'||X'0a0a'
||'The mutaplasmid colony integrated into this bioadaptive tool appears to be mature and reproducing at a healthy rate. The mutational benefits and risks of using this mutaplasmid are within relatively balanced bounds.' WHERE type_id=90468;
UPDATE types SET description='This bioadaptive mutaplasmid interface is designed to alter the functional output and performance of modulated strip miners.'||X'0a0a'
||'Triglavian bioadaptive technology makes extensive use of engineered colonies of extremophilic bacteria, that are used to grow, harvest and adapt various resources found in Abyssal Deadspace. Artificial colonizing plasmids integrated into specialist tools used for direct adaptation of technology can be found in Triglavian caches in various stages of development. These mutaplasmids can be used to alter the characteristics of a wide variety of equipment types, depending on the strain and the bioadaptive tool with which they are integrated.'||X'0a0a'
||'The mutaplasmid colony integrated into this bioadaptive tool is highly unstable, with a high rate of reproduction and mutation. The mutational benefits of using this mutaplasmid are potentially very high but the risks are also extreme.' WHERE type_id=90469;

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92565,'Raspite X-Grade','Raspite X-Grade','Raspite X-Grade','Raspita de grado X','Raspite de catégorie X','ラスパイト（グレードX）','X급 라스파이트','Raspite X-Grade','X级斜钨铅矿','This variant of Raspite ore is especially prized by Amarr engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Empire needed them.'||X'0a0a'
||'Unlike regular Raspite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92569>Crystalline Raspite</a>, which is valuable to the Amarr Empire.','type_46252_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,21823,5083,'Raspite',25,'Asteroid',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92566,'Polycrase X-Grade','Polycrase X-Grade','Polycrase X-Grade','Policrasa de grado X','Polycrase de catégorie X','ポリクレース（グレードX）','X급 폴리크레이스','Polycrase X-Grade','X级复稀金矿','This variant of Polycrase ore is especially prized by Caldari engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the State needed them.'||X'0a0a'
||'Unlike regular Polycrase ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92570>Crystalline Polycrase</a>, which is valuable to the Caldari State.','type_46252_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,21823,5084,'Polycrase',25,'Asteroid',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92567,'Moissanite X-Grade','Moissanite X-Grade','Moissanite X-Grade','Moissanita de grado X','Moissanite de catégorie X','モアサナイト（グレードX）','X급 모이사나이트','Moissanite X-Grade','X级碳硅石','This variant of Moissanite ore is especially prized by Gallente engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Federation needed them.'||X'0a0a'
||'Unlike regular Moissanite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92571>Crystalline Moissanite</a>, which is valuable to the Gallente Federation.','type_46252_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,21823,5085,'Moissanite',25,'Asteroid',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92568,'Kangite X-Grade','Kangite X-Grade','Kangite X-Grade','Kangita de grado X','Kangite de catégorie X','カンガイト（グレードX）','X급 켄자이트','Kangite X-Grade','X级钪原矿','This variant of Kangite ore is especially prized by Minmatar engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Republic needed them.'||X'0a0a'
||'Unlike regular Kangite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92572>Crystalline Kangite</a>, which is valuable to the Minmatar Republic.','type_46252_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,21823,5086,'Kangite',25,'Asteroid',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92569,'Crystalline Raspite','Crystalline Raspite','Crystalline Raspite','Raspita cristalina','Raspite cristalline','結晶性ラスパイト','결정성 라스파이트','Crystalline Raspite','晶体斜钨铅矿','The crystalline residue of reprocessed Raspite.'||X'0a0a'
||'The Amarr Empire will reward Capsuleers who bring this mineral to their Trade-In transport outside the Amarr Navy Anchorage Station located in <url=showinfo:5//30002974>Mehatoor</url>.','type_92569_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,3848,19,27347,18,'Mineral',4,'Material',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

||'The Caldari State will reward Capsuleers who bring this mineral to their Trade-In transport outside the Caldari Navy Anchorage Station located in <url=showinfo:5//30045324>Onnamon</url>.','type_92570_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,3848,19,27349,18,'Mineral',4,'Material',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

||'The Imperial War Reserves were established as a joint effort to build up and maintain a vast reserve of strategically vital materials by the Amarr Ministry of Assessment and the Ministry of War. INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92785,'Griffin Navy Issue Military Stockpile Captain SKIN','Griffin Navy Issue Military Stockpile Captain SKIN','Griffin Navy Issue Military Stockpile Captain SKIN','SKIN de Capitán de Reservas Militares para la Griffin modelo de la Armada','SKIN Griffin Navy Issue, édition Capitaine des Réserves militaires','グリフィン海軍仕様・連合軍事備蓄艦長SKIN','그리핀 해군 에디션 ''군사물자기관 대위'' SKIN','Griffin Navy Issue Military Stockpile Captain SKIN','狮鹫级海军型军事储备处上尉涂装','State Military Stockpile resource harvesting operations are considered a high priority and often commanded by a Captain of Engineers.'||X'0a0a'
||'The State Military Stockpile was created by order of the Caldari State''s Chief Executive Panel to seek out and develop militarily important resources within Caldari space. The Caldari Navy and the security forces of the "Big Eight" megacorporations are all able to draw from the deep reserves that are being built up by State Military Stockpile mining operations.','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,2000,1,0,1950,'Permanent SKIN',91,'SKINs',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

||'The Federal Strategic Materiel corporation was founded by executive order of President Jacus Roden and is tasked with finding and extracting resources vital to the Federal armed forces throughout Gallente space. The mining operations sent out to harvest resources from sites discovered by the Federal Strategic Materiel corporation have become a common sight in the Federation.','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,2000,1,0,1950,'Permanent SKIN',91,'SKINs',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92797,'Vigil Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','Vigil Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','Vigil Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','SKIN de Astilla de Artillería de la Flota para la Vigil modelo de la Flota','SKIN Vigil Fleet Issue, édition Piquier du Ravitaillement de la flotte','ヴィジリ海軍仕様・共和国海軍軍需品部スパイクSKIN','비질 함대 에디션 ''함대 군수지원부 소위'' SKIN','Vigil Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','守夜者级舰队型舰队军械处之矛涂装','Republic Fleet Ordnance mining and shipping operations are overseen by a technical specialist officer, usually of Spike Lieutenant rank.'||X'0a0a'
||'Republic Fleet Ordnance is responsible for the acquisition of materials crucial to the construction and maintenance of all kinds of equipment used by the fighting forces of the Minmatar Republic. The resource scouts of Republic Fleet Ordnance scour Minmatar space for pockets of useful asteroids and can call upon mining operations to extract any valuable materials they discover.','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,2000,1,0,1950,'Permanent SKIN',91,'SKINs',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92818,'Compressed Raspite X-Grade','Compressed Raspite X-Grade','Compressed Raspite X-Grade','Raspita comprimida de grado X','Raspite de catégorie X compriméee','圧縮ラスパイト（グレードX）','X급 압축된 라스파이트','Compressed Raspite X-Grade','高密度斜钨铅矿（5级）','This variant of Raspite ore is especially prized by Amarr engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Empire needed them.'||X'0a0a'
||'Unlike regular Raspite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92569>Crystalline Raspite</a>, which is valuable to the Amarr Empire.'||X'0a0a'
||'This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.','type_28406_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,3313,5083,'Raspite',25,'Asteroid',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92819,'Compressed Polycrase X-Grade','Compressed Polycrase X-Grade','Compressed Polycrase X-Grade','Policrasa comprimida de grado X','Polycrase de catégorie X comprimé','圧縮ポリクレース（グレードX）','X급 압축된 폴리크레이스','Compressed Polycrase X-Grade','高密度复稀金矿（5级）','This variant of Polycrase ore is especially prized by Caldari engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the State needed them.'||X'0a0a'
||'Unlike regular Polycrase ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92570>Crystalline Polycrase</a>, which is valuable to the Caldari State.'||X'0a0a'
||'This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.','type_28406_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,3313,5084,'Polycrase',25,'Asteroid',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92820,'Compressed Moissanite X-Grade','Compressed Moissanite X-Grade','Compressed Moissanite X-Grade','Moissanita comprimida de grado X','Moissanite de catégorie X comprimée','圧縮モアサナイト（グレードX）','X급 압축된 모이사나이트','Compressed Moissanite X-Grade','高密度碳硅石（5级）','This variant of Moissanite ore is especially prized by Gallente engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Federation needed them.'||X'0a0a'
||'Unlike regular Moissanite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92571>Crystalline Moissanite</a>, which is valuable to the Gallente Federation.'||X'0a0a'
||'This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.','type_28406_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,3313,5085,'Moissanite',25,'Asteroid',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92821,'Compressed Kangite X-Grade','Compressed Kangite X-Grade','Compressed Kangite X-Grade','Kangita comprimida de grado X','Kangite de catégorie X comprimée','圧縮カンガイト（グレードX）','X급 압축된 켄자이트','Compressed Kangite X-Grade','高密度钪原矿（5级）','This variant of Kangite ore is especially prized by Minmatar engineers for use in large-scale construction projects. Deposits have been held in reserve until such a time as the Republic needed them.'||X'0a0a'
||'Unlike regular Kangite ore, X-Grade is more stable and can be reprocessed without specialized equipment into <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>, as well as providing <a href=showinfo:92572>Crystalline Kangite</a>, which is valuable to the Minmatar Republic.'||X'0a0a'
||'This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.','type_28406_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,3313,5086,'Kangite',25,'Asteroid',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92822,'Salvation','Salvation','Salvation','Salvación','Salvation','サルベーション','셀베이션','Salvation','救赎级','As the dust settled following the Warpath conflict of YC128, many smaller holdings on the fringes of the Amarr Empire fell into chaos. The constant onslaughts of Minmatar Republic strike teams had left these communities exposed to pirate attacks and vulnerable to internal revolt. Local holders sought a means to reimpose control while relying on their own fleets, which unlike the Imperial Navy, were largely made up of small and medium-sized ships. '||X'0a0a'
||'They needed a way to improve the operational efficiency of these fleets while also demonstrating the awesome power of the Empire that backs them. Carthum Conglomerate’s solution to this problem was the Salvation. An advanced support carrier with robust command burst functions, it was capable of elevating a group of lesser vessels into an unstoppable armada.','type_92822_64.png',NULL,1,13950000.0,1300000.0,2925.0,1260000000.0,3856,2,0,5120,'Command Carrier',6,'Ship',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,6,4,8,2,0,0,23757,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92823,'Simurgh','Simurgh','Simurgh','Simurgh','Simurgh','シムルグ','시무르그','Simurgh','西莫夫级','Following their betrayal by the Intaki Syndicate in YC128, the Caldari State annexed the entire region of Syndicate. This annexation did not end lawlessness within the region. The CEP declared that for far too long, criminal organizations had abused the semi-legal status of Syndicate for their own means. They charged the Caldari Navy with bringing the rule of law to the region.'||X'0a0a'
||'To support these efforts, Kaalakiota developed the Simurgh. Its operational superiority was a threat that the criminal forces of Syndicate could not match. A mobile command centre with advanced combat capabilities, its mission was to bring honor to the lawless reaches of space.','type_92823_64.png',NULL,1,11925000.0,1300000.0,3310.0,1270000000.0,3859,2,0,5120,'Command Carrier',6,'Ship',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,6,8,4,2,0,0,23915,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92824,'Gaia','Gaia','Gaia','Gaia','Gaia','ガイア','가이아','Gaia','盖亚级','Predicting that superior fleet support was going to be key to future engagements as the Warpath conflict of YC128 began, President Alix Moreau reached out to Duvolle Labs to commission work on a more advanced carrier design.'||X'0a0a'
||'The team at Duvolle Labs was given unprecedented access to fleet telemetry research data to inform their design choices. They were charged with producing a ship that demonstrated the life-saving impact that advanced operational intel could have on a fleet, a flagship for Moreau’s vision of a more innovative Gallente future.','type_92824_64.png',NULL,1,13095000.0,1300000.0,3625.0,1220000000.0,3861,2,0,5120,'Command Carrier',6,'Ship',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,6,5,7,2,0,0,23911,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92825,'Ymir','Ymir','Ymir','Ymir','Ymir','ユミル','이미르','Ymir','伊米尔级','Following the escalating conflict of YC128, the Sebiestor Chief Acassa Midular called upon Core Complexion to create an elevated war platform capable of supporting the rapid response fleets she felt would be essential to Minmatar''s success in the next war to come.'||X'0a0a'
||'Core Complexion took the Nidhoggur''s classic design and elevated it with the latest advancements in fleet support technology. Superior command support technologies allow it to unlock greater speed and resilience for its accompanying fleet members. It is the ultimate expression of the Republic''s military doctrine, supercharged by the technical brilliance that Core Complexion and the Sebiestor have become synonymous with.','type_92825_64.png',NULL,1,11250000.0,1300000.0,3775.0,1230000000.0,3863,2,0,5120,'Command Carrier',6,'Ship',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,6,7,5,2,0,0,24483,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92857,'Moderate Navy Military Beacon','Moderate Navy Military Beacon','Moderate Navy Military Beacon','Baliza militar moderada de la Armada','Balise militaire Navy modérée','標準海軍軍事ビーコン','중급 해군 군사 비컨','Moderate Navy Military Beacon','中型海军军事信标','This beacon marks a moderate military location. The entry gate is configured to admit Tech I and empire faction navy ships of Battlecruiser size or smaller.'||X'0a0a'
||'The security features installed in this acceleration gate will prevent activation by any ship that is fitted with warp core stabilizer modules.','type_2335_64.png',NULL,0,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,NULL,1,0,310,'Beacon',2,'Celestial',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

The entry gate is configured to admit all ships of destroyer or smaller size of any tech level.'||X'0a0a'
||'The security features installed in this acceleration gate will prevent activation by any ship that is fitted with warp core stabilizer modules.','type_2335_64.png',NULL,0,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,NULL,1,0,310,'Beacon',2,'Celestial',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93143,'Prototype ''Pluto'' Mining Drone','Prototype ''Pluto'' Mining Drone','Prototype ''Pluto'' Mining Drone','Dron minero Pluto prototipo','Prototype de drone d''extraction ''Pluto''','プロトタイプ「プルート」採掘専門ドローン','프로토타입 ''플루토'' 채굴 드론','Prototype ''Pluto'' Mining Drone','“冥王”原型采矿无人机','A prototype drone developed by CreoDron based on ORE''s ''Excavator'' mining drone design by incorporating experimental rogue drone technology. The harvesting protocols have been altered to behave much more like a Rogue Drone would when salvaging and recycling materials to be brought back to a rogue drone hive. The result is a far more efficient mining process creating less residue, albeit a slower one resulting in lower mining yields over time. '||X'0a0a'
||'Currently this drone is unsuitable for mass production due to a high rejection rate with the rogue drone technology. CreoDron is hoping to improve their understanding of this process from knowledge gained from the Gallente Federation Military Campaign operation ''Rogue Edge''.','type_41030_64.png',NULL,1,1100.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,158,4,0,101,'Mining Drone',18,'Drone',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,10246,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

The harvesting protocols have been altered to behave much more like a Rogue Drone would when salvaging and recycling materials to be brought back to a rogue drone hive. The result is a far more efficient mining process creating less residue, albeit a slower one resulting in lower mining yields over time. '||X'0a0a'

The entry gate is configured to only admit Interceptors.'||X'0a0a'
||'The security features installed in this acceleration gate will prevent activation by any ship that is fitted with warp core stabilizer modules.','type_2335_64.png',NULL,0,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,NULL,1,0,310,'Beacon',2,'Celestial',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
UPDATE types SET name='Subcapital Operations', de_name='Subcapital Operations', en_name='Subcapital Operations', es_name='Subcapital Operations', fr_name='Subcapital Operations', ja_name='Subcapital Operations', ko_name='Subcapital Operations', ru_name='Subcapital Operations', zh_name='Subcapital Operations', description='<font size="14"><b>Secrets Operations Expert System</b></font>'||X'0a0a'
||'This Expert System has been loaded with advanced ship operation skills, to mimic the experience of an Omega capsuleer.'||X'0a0a'
||'An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active <b>1 day</b> rental period. '||X'0a'
||'As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.'||X'0a0a'
||'<font size="14"><b>Activating an Expert System</b></font>'||X'0a0a'
||'Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.'||X'0a0a'
||'<i>Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar''s HyperNet.</i>' WHERE type_id=93150;

In his tenure overseeing the occupation of Matar, this villainous figure has administered countless horrors on the native people.','type_default.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,300.0,1300000.0,NULL,1,0,1731,'Irregular Super Carrier',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Generic','Carrier','faction_500021.png');

||'The digital sequence of this pattern license has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this pattern you must provide <a href=showinfo:81348>Alignment Sequencer</a> to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing.','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.1,NULL,NULL,NULL,3633,1,27438,4726,'Ship SKIN Design Element',2118,'Personalization',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

Intended to deliver crucial military supplies to the Amarr Empire on the frontlines.'||X'0a0a'
||'The Minmatar Republic will reward capsuleers who intercept these supply packages and bring them to Tribal Liberation Force stations in their loyalty point store.','type_53530_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,0.01,20,1,24297,314,'Miscellaneous',17,'Commodity',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

With it, they plan on spreading their heresy across the Empire.','type_default.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,300.0,1300000.0,NULL,1,0,1724,'Irregular Dreadnought',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,900.0,600.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Generic','Dreadnought','faction_500021.png');

||'Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.','type_93908_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,30.0,2033,4,21439,1395,'Missile Guidance Enhancer',7,'Module',1.0,10.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,35770,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

||'Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.','type_93908_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,30.0,2033,4,21439,1395,'Missile Guidance Enhancer',7,'Module',1.0,10.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,35770,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

||'This module also lowers the activition cost of <b>energy turrets</b>.'||X'0a0a'
||'Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.','type_14100_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,30.0,707,4,1640,211,'Tracking Enhancer',7,'Module',1.0,10.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1998,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93960,'Minmatar Occupied Stargate','Minmatar Occupied Stargate','Minmatar Occupied Stargate','Portal estelar ocupado por minmatarianos','Portail stellaire occupé minmatar','ミンマター占領スターゲート','민마타 점령당한 스타게이트','Minmatar Occupied Stargate','米玛塔尔占领的星门','The old smuggling route gates were built by a coalition of Minmatar rebels and various pirate factions as a means to travel quickly and discreetly between the outer regions of space. They are favored by many to whom Empire Space is too high-profile and wish to keep a good distance from the vigilant fleet commanders of CONCORD.','type_12292_64.png',NULL,0,100000000.0,NULL,10000.0,1.0e+35,NULL,1,0,319,'Large Collidable Structure',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Other','Other','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93963,'''Aergia'' Hobgoblin SW-300','''Aergia'' Hobgoblin SW-300','''Aergia'' Hobgoblin SW-300','Hobgoblin SW-300 Aergia','Hobgoblin ''Aergia'' SW-300','「アエルギア」ホブゴブリンSW-300','''아이르기아'' 홉고블린 SW-300','''Aergia'' Hobgoblin SW-300','“阿厄吉亚”地精灵SW-300','Light Webifier Drone'||X'0a0a'
||'Because of the instability inherent in affixing large, ship-capable webifier equipment to a small, mobile, independently powered carrier such as a mobile drone, the manufacturer had to sacrifice certain aspects of the drone''s infrastructure. As a result, the drone has a high signature radius, making it relatively easy to target and hit, and isn''t sturdy enough to suffer more than a few blows to its carapace.','type_31880_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,3000.0,841,4,0,641,'Stasis Webifying Drone',18,'Drone',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,23731,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93998,'Federation Navy ''Argyreos'' Magnetic Field Stabilizer','Federation Navy ''Argyreos'' Magnetic Field Stabilizer','Federation Navy ''Argyreos'' Magnetic Field Stabilizer','Estabilizador de campo magnético Argyreos de la Armada de la Federación','Stabilisateur de champ magnétique ''Argyreos'' de la Federation Navy','連邦海軍「アルギュレオス」磁場制御器','연방 해군 ''아르기레오스'' 자기장 안정기','Federation Navy ''Argyreos'' Magnetic Field Stabilizer','联邦海军“银星”磁性力场稳定器','The Federation Navy ''Argyreos'' Magnetic Field Stabilizer is a special modification of the standard Magnetic Field Stabilizer to include command, control and communications firmware that will enhance drones alongside hybrid turrets.'||X'0a0a'
||'Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.','type_13945_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,648,4,26454,302,'Magnetic Field Stabilizer',7,'Module',1.0,32.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,9944,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

They are favored by many to whom Empire Space is too high-profile and wish to keep a good distance from the vigilant fleet commanders of CONCORD.','type_12292_64.png',NULL,0,100000000.0,NULL,10000.0,1.0e+35,NULL,1,0,319,'Large Collidable Structure',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Other','Other','faction_500021.png');

UPDATE types SET description='As the Warpath Conflict consumes the Amarr Empire, Empress Catiz I has put out a call to all defenders of the faith. The Ammatar Mandate answered that call, sending their most expert pilots to fight against the invaders. They adorned their vessels with scripture and pledged their lives to their holy mission. The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire.' WHERE type_id=94032;

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(94058,'Imperial Navy ''Neophyte'' Heat Sink','Imperial Navy ''Neophyte'' Heat Sink','Imperial Navy ''Neophyte'' Heat Sink','Disipador de calor Neophyte de la Armada Imperial','Dissipateur thermique ''Neophyte'' de l''Imperial Navy','帝国海軍「ネオファイト」放熱機','제국 해군 ''네오파이트'' 방열판','Imperial Navy ''Neophyte'' Heat Sink','帝国海军“新手”散热槽','The Imperial Navy ''Neophyte'' Heat Sink is a special modification of the standard Heat Sink to include command, control and communications firmware that will enhance drones alongside energy turrets.'||X'0a0a'
||'Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.','type_13941_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,647,4,26453,205,'Heat Sink',7,'Module',1.0,32.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,2363,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

||'Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.','type_13941_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,647,4,26453,205,'Heat Sink',7,'Module',1.0,37.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,2363,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

This module can be loaded with scripts to increase its effectiveness in certain areas. '||X'0a0a'
||'Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.','type_94063_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,1.0,NULL,2032,4,21437,1396,'Missile Guidance Computer',7,'Module',1.0,28.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,35788,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

||'Increases mining laser and ice harvester critical success chance and critical success bonus yield.'||X'0a'
||'Decreases mining laser, ice harvester, and gas cloud harvester residue probability.'||X'0a'
||'Enhances the integrated Mining Surveyor present in mining vessels by adding information about the quantity of ore remaining in scanned asteroids.','type_94065_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,714,4,2732,49,'Mining Survey Chipset',7,'Module',1.0,10.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,444,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

Works only with regular ECMs, not ECM Bursts.'||X'0a0a'
||'Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.','type_85006_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,967,4,1046,514,'ECM Stabilizer',7,'Module',1.0,25.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,25561,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(95173,'Suspect Scout Navy Military Beacon','Suspect Scout Navy Military Beacon','Suspect Scout Navy Military Beacon','Baliza militar de reconocimiento de la Armada sospechosa','Balise militaire d''éclaireur Navy suspecte','容疑者偵察用海軍軍事ビーコン','용의자 정찰 해군 군사 비컨','Suspect Scout Navy Military Beacon','嫌犯侦察海军军事信标','This beacon marks a scout military location. The entry gate is configured to admit Tech I and empire faction navy ships of Frigate size.'||X'0a0a'
||'The security features installed in this acceleration gate will prevent activation by any ship that is fitted with warp core stabilizer modules. Additionally, it will provide all capsuleers with a suspect timer when they activate the acceleration gate.','type_2335_64.png',NULL,0,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,NULL,1,0,310,'Beacon',2,'Celestial',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(95191,'Pioneer Starter Crate','Pioneer Starter Crate','Pioneer Starter Crate','Caja de principiante para la Pioneer','Caisse de démarrage Pioneer','パイオニア用スタータークレート','파이오니어 스타터 상자','Pioneer Starter Crate','开拓者级新手箱','This item cannot be traded or sold on the market.','type_63772_64.png',NULL,0,4.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,25330,1194,'Special Edition Commodities',63,'Special Edition Assets',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(95192,'Pioneer','Pioneer','Pioneer','Pioneer','Pioneer','パイオニア','파이오니어','Pioneer','开拓者级','<font size="14"><b>Pioneer Expert System</b></font>'||X'0a0a'
||'This Expert System makes available skills enabling the Capsuleer to fly a Mining Destroyer, such as a Pioneer.'||X'0a0a'
||'<b>The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for 7 days.</b>'||X'0a0a'
||'An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.'||X'0a0a'
||'<font size="14"><b>Activating an Expert System</b></font>'||X'0a0a'
||'Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.'||X'0a0a'
||'<i>Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar''s HyperNet.</i>','type_57207_64.png',NULL,0,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,NULL,1,24602,4091,'Standard Expert Systems',2100,'Expert Systems',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

||'This filament can only be activated by capsuleers <b>under 35 days old</b> with <b>2 million or fewer</b> skill points.'||X'0a0a'
||'AIR has issued this filament to celebrate the opening of Exordium, a region dedicated to new pilots. With CONCORD’s protection and AIR’s guidance, capsuleers in Exordium can learn the skills they need to face the threats of wider New Eden, and earn the rewards they offer.','type_79996_64.png',NULL,1,0.1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,26016,4041,'Jump Filaments',17,'Commodity',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

They answer directly to the president, and their primary mission directive is to disrupt the Caldari operations by any means necessary.','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,2356,17,0,1950,'Permanent SKIN',91,'SKINs',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

The Amattar Mandate answered that call, sending their most expert pilots to fight against the invaders. They adorned their vessels with scripture and pledged their lives to their holy mission. The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire.','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,3497,17,0,1950,'Permanent SKIN',91,'SKINs',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

Assembled during the Warpath conflict by the CEP, their task is to defend megacorp assets from Gallente assault and safeguard the infrastructure that holds the State together. These Regulators are the ultimate combination of State loyalty and corporate honor.','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,3497,17,0,1950,'Permanent SKIN',91,'SKINs',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

Assembled during the Warpath conflict by the CEP, their task is to defend megacorp assets from Gallente assault and safeguard the infrastructure that holds the State together. These Regulators are the ultimate combination of State loyalty and corporate honor.','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,1957,17,0,1950,'Permanent SKIN',91,'SKINs',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(95299,'Talwar Fleet Issue Stark Strategist SKIN','Talwar Fleet Issue Stark Strategist SKIN','Talwar Fleet Issue Stark Strategist SKIN','Talwar Fleet Issue Stark Strategist SKIN','Talwar Fleet Issue Stark Strategist SKIN','Talwar Fleet Issue Stark Strategist SKIN','Talwar Fleet Issue Stark Strategist SKIN','Talwar Fleet Issue Stark Strategist SKIN','Talwar Fleet Issue Stark Strategist SKIN','The smallest of the tribes by far, the Starkmanir are masters of ancient warfare strategies and battle wisdom all but lost by the other tribes. These strategies provide the basis for a Starkmanir Strategic wing, a small force of extremely effective Starkmanir pilots that came together in response to the Warpath Conflict. Famed for their ability to establish tactical superiority even against much larger enemy fleets, the Warpath Stark are often underestimated but never outclassed.','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,3497,17,0,1950,'Permanent SKIN',91,'SKINs',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

UPDATE types SET description='与敌对代理人进行互动的技能，以此来缓和双方的紧张局势。每升一级，对于敌对代理人的有效声望值增加4%。不与关系学或者犯罪关系研究技能累加。该技能对加入和保持在势力战争中的声望要求没有影响。' WHERE type_id=3357;

UPDATE types SET description='铁骑舰载机辅助单元支援所有铁骑舰载机操作，包括附加铁骑舰载机后勤无人机、铁骑舰载机功率传输器和高级感应器支援。注：只能装配在航母、指挥航母或超级航母上。惩罚：在一艘舰船上或一支铁骑舰载机中队中使用多个这类装备或多个与该装备作用一致的类似装备将削弱实际使用效果。' WHERE type_id=24283;

UPDATE types SET repackaged_volume=10000.0 WHERE type_id=34590;
UPDATE types SET description='屹立提炼设施是一种服务装备，装在昇威科技建筑上可以提供提炼和压缩服务。默认的提炼率是50%，这一数字可以通过加装屹立改装件来提高。注意，该设施无法压缩可采集气云和卫星矿石，只有装备了舰载压缩装备的工业指挥舰及旗舰级工业指挥舰才能进行此类压缩。如果昇威建筑启用了至少一个服务装备，将进入全能量运转模式，将会额外获得海量的护盾和装甲值以及一个额外的增强模式循环。屹立专用系统采用了昇威建筑分控纳米装配装置，由集成模版软件、纳米装配阵列和许多纳米块体构成。安装在采用昇威科技建造的建筑上的专门槽位中可以制造各种服务装备、建筑装备和建筑改装件。' WHERE type_id=35899;
UPDATE types SET gun_slot=3 WHERE type_id=37456;
UPDATE types SET description='这个装备可以将使用者和附近最多24艘舰船，以及其全部无人机、铁骑舰载机、探针和炸弹瞬间传送到前方100km的地方。被传送后，舰船的移动方向和速度保持不变。注：这种微型跳跃力场只影响有人驾驶舰船，对某些舰船类型无效，包括：旗舰、货舰和工业指挥舰。' WHERE type_id=37479;
UPDATE types SET description='在极短时间内大幅提高航行速度。推进舰船的动力和相应的最大速度加成均受使用该装备的舰船重量所限。该系统运转所需的高额能量值意味着它必须使用部分电容输出的能量，以确保跃迁有效力场的完整性。启用该装备会显著增加舰船的电磁辐射信号。惩罚：最大电容减少。注：只能用于旗舰级舰船。' WHERE type_id=41252;
UPDATE types SET description='在极短时间内大幅提高航行速度。推进舰船的动力和相应的最大速度加成均受使用该装备的舰船重量所限。该系统运转所需的高额能量值意味着它必须使用部分电容输出的能量，以确保跃迁有效力场的完整性。启用该装备会显著增加舰船的电磁辐射信号。惩罚：最大电容减少。注：只能用于旗舰级舰船。' WHERE type_id=41253;

UPDATE types SET description='<font size="14"><b>执法者专家系统</b></font>使用该专家系统提供的技能，克隆飞行员可以驾驶各种T1驱逐舰。<b>这个专家系统提供的技能持续7天。</b>专家系统是一种远程受限人工智能，可在租赁有效期内为你提供访问特定技能的权限。专家系统不依托于克隆体和太空舱，因此处于有效期内的专家系统在太空舱损毁或进行远距克隆时也能继续使用。<font size="14"><b>启用专家系统</b></font>克隆飞行员兑换此物品后就会自动启用专家系统。<i>专家系统由PKN星际财团研发，由财团下属军团通过超光速网络通信来进行推广。专家系统是一种基于虚拟大脑技术的受限人工智能。专家系统使用了通过技能训练或技能注入产生的神经通路，与太空舱界面和控制系统兼容。通过PKN星际集团超网上的专用超光速频道可以实现实时指令和控制通信。</i>' WHERE type_id=87492;
UPDATE types SET description='<font size="14"><b>自由战士专家系统</b></font>使用该专家系统提供的技能，克隆飞行员可以驾驶各种T1巡洋舰。<b>这个专家系统提供的技能持续7天。</b>专家系统是一种远程受限人工智能，可在租赁有效期内为你提供访问特定技能的权限。专家系统不依托于克隆体和太空舱，因此处于有效期内的专家系统在太空舱损毁或进行远距克隆时也能继续使用。<font size="14"><b>启用专家系统</b></font>克隆飞行员兑换此物品后就会自动启用专家系统。<i>专家系统由PKN星际财团研发，由财团下属军团通过超光速网络通信来进行推广。专家系统是一种基于虚拟大脑技术的受限人工智能。专家系统使用了通过技能训练或技能注入产生的神经通路，与太空舱界面和控制系统兼容。通过PKN星际集团超网上的专用超光速频道可以实现实时指令和控制通信。</i>' WHERE type_id=87494;
UPDATE types SET description='<font size="14"><b>探险家专家系统</b></font>使用该专家系统提供的技能，克隆飞行员可以驾驶装配基础航行、扫描和破译设备的探险护卫舰。该系统不包括隐形技能，因此最适合在高安星系探索。<b>这个专家系统提供的技能持续7天。</b>专家系统是一种远程受限人工智能，可在租赁有效期内为你提供访问特定技能的权限。专家系统不依托于克隆体和太空舱，因此处于有效期内的专家系统在太空舱损毁或进行远距克隆时也能继续使用。<font size="14"><b>启用专家系统</b></font>克隆飞行员兑换此物品后就会自动启用专家系统。<i>专家系统由PKN星际财团研发，由财团下属军团通过超光速网络通信来进行推广。专家系统是一种基于虚拟大脑技术的受限人工智能。专家系统使用了通过技能训练或技能注入产生的神经通路，与太空舱界面和控制系统兼容。通过PKN星际集团超网上的专用超光速频道可以实现实时指令和控制通信。</i>' WHERE type_id=87496;
UPDATE types SET description='<font size="14"><b>工业家专家系统</b></font>这个专家系统提供的技能让克隆飞行员可以驾驶采矿驳船（例如妄想级采矿驳船），此外还能使用露天采矿器I和冰矿采集器I。你还能利用该专家系统学习制造技能。<b>这个专家系统提供的技能持续7天。</b>专家系统是一种远程受限人工智能，可在租赁有效期内为你提供访问特定技能的权限。专家系统不依托于克隆体和太空舱，因此处于有效期内的专家系统在太空舱损毁或进行远距克隆时也能继续使用。<font size="14"><b>启用专家系统</b></font>克隆飞行员兑换此物品后就会自动启用专家系统。<i>专家系统由PKN星际财团研发，由财团下属军团通过超光速网络通信来进行推广。专家系统是一种基于虚拟大脑技术的受限人工智能。专家系统使用了通过技能训练或技能注入产生的神经通路，与太空舱界面和控制系统兼容。通过PKN星际集团超网上的专用超光速频道可以实现实时指令和控制通信。</i>' WHERE type_id=87500;
UPDATE types SET description='这个箱子里包含一个随机的克隆飞行员之日XXIII魅惑增效剂。' WHERE type_id=87925;

UPDATE types SET description='这种生物自适应突变质体接口旨在改变调制型露天采矿器，使其功能输出与整体性能发生变异。三神裔生化适应科技广泛应用了极端微生物细菌种群，这种细菌种群生长于并可适应深渊空间中发现的各种资源。将人工种群质体植入用以快速适应技术的专用工具这一做法在三神裔的各个发展阶段都有出现。这些突变质体可以用来改变多种设备类型的特性，效果根据植入的生化适应工具不同而有所差别。植入这个生化适应工具的突变质体种群看上去已经成熟，正以一种健康的方式进行自我繁殖。使用这种突变质体带来的益处和危险性处于一种微妙的相对平衡。' WHERE type_id=90468;
UPDATE types SET description='这种生物自适应突变质体接口旨在改变调制型露天采矿器，使其功能输出与整体性能发生变异。三神裔生化适应科技广泛应用了极端微生物细菌种群，这种细菌种群生长于并可适应深渊空间中发现的各种资源。将人工种群质体植入用以快速适应技术的专用工具这一做法在三神裔的各个发展阶段都有出现。这些突变质体可以用来改变多种设备类型的特性，效果根据植入的生化适应工具不同而有所差别。植入这个生化适应工具的突变质体种群非常不稳定，繁殖和突变的频率非常高。使用这种突变质体带来的突变收益可能非常高，但风险也非常大。' WHERE type_id=90469;

UPDATE types SET name='第二十一届联盟锦标赛脚本', zh_name='第二十一届联盟锦标赛脚本' WHERE type_id=91387;
UPDATE types SET name='龙骑兵级海军型', es_name='Dragoon modelo de la Armada', ja_name='ドラグーン海軍仕様', ko_name='드라군 해군 에디션', zh_name='龙骑兵级海军型', description='YC128年，为应对日益升级的军事冲突，艾玛海军受命研发一款专用驱逐舰。随着边境局势日益紧张、与米玛塔尔之间的冲突不断升级，海军迫切需要一种多功能舰船，既能投入军事作战，也能有效维护帝国的权威。最终诞生的便是“龙骑兵级海军型”。该舰船融合了龙骑兵级的中和与瘫痪能力，并提升了导弹与激光战斗能力。这是帝国力量的真正象征，可随时奉女皇之命迅速部署至任何地点。' WHERE type_id=91775;
UPDATE types SET name='阿尔格斯级海军型', es_name='Algos modelo de la Armada', ja_name='アルゴス海軍仕様', ko_name='알고스 해군 에디션', zh_name='阿尔格斯级海军型' WHERE type_id=91849;
UPDATE types SET name='渡鸦级海军型', es_name='Corax modelo de la Armada', ja_name='コラックス海軍仕様', ko_name='코락스 해군 에디션', zh_name='渡鸦级海军型', description='YC128年，吉他星系的管辖权正式移交统合部。失去这一标志性星系后，加达里合众国亟需一个新的力量象征，凝聚民心、重振国威。为此，经典的渡鸦级被选为原型，打造为一款全面升级的新型军用舰船，肩负起领导对盖伦特攻势的重任，成为加达里人共同追随的旗帜。更坚固的护盾、更灵活的装配方案、以及攻击爆炸力的大幅提升，使渡鸦级海军型成为加达里卓越军工传统的极致体现。' WHERE type_id=91857;
UPDATE types SET name='弯刀级舰队型', es_name='Talwar modelo de la Flota', ja_name='タルワー海軍仕様', ko_name='탈와르 함대 에디션', zh_name='弯刀级舰队型', description='YC128年，对“大荒野”的图克尔部落而言，是一个繁荣的时期。为保护因新发现的“相位场”而涌入的财富，他们投票支持增加共和舰队的开支。这笔投入的成果之一，便是催生了全新的“弯刀级舰队型”。该舰在图克尔工程师的协助下设计而成，融合了舰队型舰船的坚固坚韧与图克尔部族特有的灵活高效——正是这种高效，使得大荒野的商队在其家园空间内所向披靡。' WHERE type_id=91858;
UPDATE types SET name='龙骑兵级海军型蓝图', es_name='Plano de la Dragoon modelo de la Armada', fr_name='Plan de construction Dragoon Navy Issue', ja_name='ドラグーン海軍仕様設計図', ko_name='드라군 해군 에디션 블루프린트', zh_name='龙骑兵级海军型蓝图' WHERE type_id=91859;
UPDATE types SET name='阿尔格斯级海军型蓝图', es_name='Plano de la Algos modelo de la Armada', fr_name='Plan de construction Algos Navy Issue', ja_name='アルゴス海軍仕様設計図', ko_name='알고스 해군 에디션 블루프린트', zh_name='阿尔格斯级海军型蓝图' WHERE type_id=91861;
UPDATE types SET name='弯刀级舰队型蓝图', es_name='Plano de la Talwar modelo de la Flota', fr_name='Plan de construction Talwar Fleet Issue', ja_name='タルワー海軍仕様設計図', ko_name='탈와르 함대 에디션 블루프린트', zh_name='弯刀级舰队型蓝图' WHERE type_id=91862;
UPDATE types SET name='龙骑兵级海军型军团徽章', es_name='Emblema de la corporación para la Dragoon modelo de la Armada', fr_name='Emblème de corporation pour Dragoon Navy Issue', ja_name='ドラグーン海軍仕様用コーポレーションエンブレム', ko_name='드라군 해군 에디션 코퍼레이션 문장', zh_name='龙骑兵级海军型军团徽章', description='派瑞根徽章为你的舰船带来全新个性化色彩。通过访问你的注册身份数据，这些纳米全息投影会在你最喜爱的舰船上印上与你有关的符号。而现在，通过最新的云端AI同步技术，徽章即使在跃迁过程中也能保持稳定。立即造访离你最近的IRIS，参与派瑞根的最新活动，解锁新的徽章。派瑞根，精益求精。警告：完成购买后，徽章将自动注入，并且无法在克隆飞行员之间转让或交易。派瑞根军团对传输失败不承担任何责任。' WHERE type_id=91863;
UPDATE types SET name='龙骑兵级海军型联盟徽章', es_name='Emblema de la alianza para la Dragoon modelo de la Armada', fr_name='Emblème d''alliance pour Dragoon Navy Issue', ja_name='ドラグーン海軍仕様用アライアンスエンブレム', ko_name='드라군 해군 에디션 얼라이언스 문장', zh_name='龙骑兵级海军型联盟徽章', description='派瑞根徽章为你的舰船带来全新个性化色彩。通过访问你的注册身份数据，这些纳米全息投影会在你最喜爱的舰船上印上与你有关的符号。而现在，通过最新的云端AI同步技术，徽章即使在跃迁过程中也能保持稳定。立即造访离你最近的IRIS，参与派瑞根的最新活动，解锁新的徽章。派瑞根，精益求精。警告：完成购买后，徽章将自动注入，并且无法在克隆飞行员之间转让或交易。派瑞根军团对传输失败不承担任何责任。' WHERE type_id=91864;

UPDATE types SET name='弯刀级舰队型军团徽章', es_name='Emblema de la corporación para la Talwar modelo de la Flota', fr_name='Emblème de corporation pour Talwar Fleet Issue', ja_name='タルワー海軍仕様用コーポレーションエンブレム', ko_name='탈와르 함대 에디션 코퍼레이션 문장', zh_name='弯刀级舰队型军团徽章', description='派瑞根徽章为你的舰船带来全新个性化色彩。通过访问你的注册身份数据，这些纳米全息投影会在你最喜爱的舰船上印上与你有关的符号。而现在，通过最新的云端AI同步技术，徽章即使在跃迁过程中也能保持稳定。立即造访离你最近的IRIS，参与派瑞根的最新活动，解锁新的徽章。派瑞根，精益求精。警告：完成购买后，徽章将自动注入，并且无法在克隆飞行员之间转让或交易。派瑞根军团对传输失败不承担任何责任。' WHERE type_id=91869;
UPDATE types SET name='弯刀级舰队型联盟徽章', es_name='Emblema de la alianza para la Talwar modelo de la Flota', fr_name='Emblème d''alliance pour Talwar Fleet Issue', ja_name='タルワー海軍仕様用アライアンスエンブレム', ko_name='탈와르 함대 에디션 얼라이언스 문장', zh_name='弯刀级舰队型联盟徽章', description='派瑞根徽章为你的舰船带来全新个性化色彩。通过访问你的注册身份数据，这些纳米全息投影会在你最喜爱的舰船上印上与你有关的符号。而现在，通过最新的云端AI同步技术，徽章即使在跃迁过程中也能保持稳定。立即造访离你最近的IRIS，参与派瑞根的最新活动，解锁新的徽章。派瑞根，精益求精。警告：完成购买后，徽章将自动注入，并且无法在克隆飞行员之间转让或交易。派瑞根军团对传输失败不承担任何责任。' WHERE type_id=91870;
UPDATE types SET name='军事行动专家系统', es_name='Sistema experto de campaña militar', fr_name='Système expert de campagne militaire', ja_name='軍事キャンペーンエキスパートシステム', ko_name='군사 작전 전문가 시스템', zh_name='军事行动专家系统', description='<font size="14"><b>海军驱逐舰专家系统</b></font>使用该专家系统提供的技能，克隆飞行员可以驾驶全部四款新型海军势力驱逐舰（以及现有的四款）。这是为了庆祝军事行动上线而推出的专家系统。<b>该专家系统提供的技能持续四天。</b>专家系统是一种远程受限人工智能，可在租赁有效期内为你提供访问特定技能的权限。专家系统不依托于克隆体和太空舱，因此处于有效期内的专家系统在太空舱损毁或进行远距克隆时也能继续使用。<font size="14"><b>启用专家系统</b></font>克隆飞行员兑换此物品后就会自动启用专家系统。<i>专家系统由PKN星际财团研发，由财团下属军团通过超光速网络通信来进行推广。专家系统是一种基于虚拟大脑技术的受限人工智能。专家系统使用了通过技能训练或技能注入产生的神经通路，与太空舱界面和控制系统兼容。通过PKN星际集团超网上的专用超光速频道可以实现实时指令和控制通信。</i>' WHERE type_id=91910;
UPDATE types SET name='帝国电子系统增效剂I', es_name='Potenciador de electrónica del Imperio I', fr_name='Booster électronique de l''Empire I', ja_name='帝国エレクトロニクスブースターI', ko_name='제국 전자공학 부스터 I', zh_name='帝国电子系统增效剂I', description='这款增效剂由艾玛帝国生产，旨在协助克隆飞行员进行军事行动作战。<b>+4%停滞缠绕光束抗性 +2%扫描探针强度 +2%最大锁定范围 +4%采矿暴击成功率。基础持续时间：2小时<b><b>过期时间：YC128年11月10日</b>' WHERE type_id=91916;
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(91920,'合众国电子系统增效剂I','State Electronics Booster I','State Electronics Booster I','Potenciador de electrónica del Estado I','Booster électronique de l''État I','連合エレクトロニクスブースターI','연합 전자공학 부스터 I','State Electronics Booster I','合众国电子系统增效剂I','这款增效剂由加达里合众国生产，旨在协助克隆飞行员进行军事行动作战。<b>+4%感应抑阻器抗性 +2%扫描探针强度 +2%最大锁定范围 +4%采矿暴击成功率。基础持续时间：2小时<b><b>过期时间：YC128年11月10日</b>','type_63653_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,2531,19,25240,303,'增效剂',20,'植入体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(91921,'联邦电子系统增效剂I','Federation Electronics Booster I','Federation Electronics Booster I','Potenciador de electrónica de la Federación I','Booster électronique de la Fédération I','連邦エレクトロニクスブースターI','연방 전자공학 부스터 I','Federation Electronics Booster I','联邦电子系统增效剂I','这款增效剂由盖伦特联邦生产，旨在协助克隆飞行员进行军事行动作战。<b>+12%舰船感应强度 +2%扫描探针强度 +2%扫描分辨率 +4%采矿暴击成功率。基础持续时间：2小时<b><b>过期时间：YC128年11月10日</b>','type_63661_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,2531,19,25235,303,'增效剂',20,'植入体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(91932,'帝国防御增效剂I','Imperial Defense Booster I','Imperial Defense Booster I','Potenciador de defensa del Imperio I','Booster de défenses de l''Empire I','帝国防衛ブースターI','제국 방어 부스터 I','Imperial Defense Booster I','帝国防御增效剂I','这款增效剂由艾玛帝国生产，旨在协助克隆飞行员进行军事行动作战。<b>+2%爆炸护盾、装甲和船体抗性 +1%动能护盾、装甲和船体抗性 +4数据分析仪和遗迹分析仪病毒同步率 -4%采矿、冰块和气体收集产生残留物的概率。基础持续时间：2小时<b><b>过期时间：YC128年11月10日</b>','type_63645_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,2790,19,25250,303,'增效剂',20,'植入体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(91958,'联邦机动性增效剂II','Federation Mobility Booster II','Federation Mobility Booster II','Potenciador de movilidad de la Federación II','Booster de mobilité de la Fédération II','連邦機動性ブースターII','연방 기동력 부스터 II','Federation Mobility Booster II','联邦机动性增效剂II','这款增效剂由盖伦特联邦生产，旨在协助克隆飞行员进行军事行动作战。<b>+4%舰船灵活性 -6%微型跃迁推进器电容消耗 +6%跃迁速度 +8%所有采矿激光器的范围</b><b>过期时间：YC128年11月10日</b>','type_60701_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,2791,19,25236,303,'增效剂',20,'植入体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(91959,'联邦机动性增效剂III','Federation Mobility Booster III','Federation Mobility Booster III','Potenciador de movilidad de la Federación III','Booster de mobilité de la Fédération III','連邦機動性ブースターIII','연방 기동력 부스터 III','Federation Mobility Booster III','联邦机动性增效剂III','这款增效剂由盖伦特联邦生产，旨在协助克隆飞行员进行军事行动作战。<b>+6%舰船灵活性 -9%微型跃迁推进器电容消耗 +9%跃迁速度 +12%所有采矿激光器的范围</b><b>过期时间：YC128年11月10日</b>','type_63663_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,2791,19,25237,303,'增效剂',20,'植入体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(91960,'共和国机动性增效剂II','Republic Mobility Booster II','Republic Mobility Booster II','Potenciador de movilidad de la República II','Booster de mobilité de la République II','共和国機動性ブースターII','공화국 기동력 부스터 II','Republic Mobility Booster II','共和国机动性增效剂II','这款增效剂由米玛塔尔共和国生产，旨在协助克隆飞行员进行军事行动作战。<b>+4%舰船速度 -6%微型跃迁推进器电容消耗 +6%跃迁速度 +8%所有采矿激光器的范围</b><b>过期时间：YC128年11月10日</b>','type_63670_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,2791,19,25246,303,'增效剂',20,'植入体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

||'<b>+2% bonus to Energy Turret Damage'||X'0a'
||'+2% bonus to Drone Damage'||X'0a'
||'+2% reduction in Mining, Ice and Gas Harvester duration and capacitor use. '||X'0a'
||'+4% reduction in Salvager cycle time'||X'0a'
||'Base Duration: 2 Hours.</b>'||X'0a0a'
||'<b>Expiry date: November 10th YC128</b>','type_63645_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,2792,19,25250,303,'增效剂',20,'植入体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

UPDATE types SET description='这种低纯度的凡晶石矿带，其产出比新伊甸其他地区的普通矿带要低50%。这种矿带最常见于始源星域。凡晶石是已知空间的核心星域中最为常见的矿石。它富含人们大量使用的三钛合金，因此需求仍然十分稳定。' WHERE type_id=92371;
UPDATE types SET description='这种低纯度的凡晶石矿带，其产出比新伊甸其他地区的普通矿带要低50%。这种矿带最常见于始源星域。凡晶石是已知空间的核心星域中最为常见的矿石。它富含人们大量使用的三钛合金，因此需求仍然十分稳定。这种矿物被压缩过，比它的原始形态紧密得多。' WHERE type_id=92372;
UPDATE types SET description='这种低纯度的灼烧岩矿带，其产出比新伊甸其他地区的普通矿带要低50%。这种矿带最常见于始源星域。灼烧岩是已知空间的核心星域中最为常见的矿石。它可以提炼出三钛合金和类晶体胶矿，因此对刚开启采矿生涯的玩家来说是个不错的选择。' WHERE type_id=92373;
UPDATE types SET description='这种低纯度的灼烧岩矿带，其产出比新伊甸其他地区的普通矿带要低50%。这种矿带更常见于始源星域。灼烧岩是已知空间的核心星域中最为常见的矿石。它可以提炼出三钛合金和类晶体胶矿，因此对刚开启采矿生涯的玩家来说是个不错的选择。这种矿物被压缩过，比它的原始形态紧密得多。' WHERE type_id=92374;
