INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92551,'帝国启示级','Imperial Omen','Imperial Omen','Omen imperial','Omen impérial','帝国オーメン','제국 오멘','Imperial Omen','帝国启示级','一艘艾玛海军启示级巡洋舰，负责保卫整个艾玛-米玛塔尔战区内的关键军事控制点。','type_9960_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,440.0,10000000.0,NULL,1,0,1179,'势力战争艾玛帝国巡洋舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,7.0,5.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'势力战争','艾玛帝国','巡洋舰','faction_500003.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92552,'弃世者启示级','Renouncer Omen','Renouncer Omen','Omen de renunciante','Omen renonciateur','リナウンサーオーメン','의절관 오멘','Renouncer Omen','弃世者启示级','一艘由艾玛海军委任的启示级巡洋舰专精型号，负责拦截任何威胁艾玛-米玛塔尔战区内关键军事控制点的敌方力量。','type_9960_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,440.0,10000000.0,NULL,1,0,1179,'势力战争艾玛帝国巡洋舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,7.0,5.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'势力战争','艾玛帝国','巡洋舰','faction_500003.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92553,'拘留者狞獾级','Detainer Caracal','Detainer Caracal','Caracal de captor','Caracal de détention','ディテイナーカラカル','압류자 카라칼','Detainer Caracal','拘留者狞獾级','一艘由加达里海军委任的狞獾级巡洋舰专精型号，负责拦截任何威胁加达里-盖伦特战区内关键军事控制点的敌方力量。','type_10050_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,440.0,10000000.0,NULL,1,0,1180,'势力战争加达里合众国巡洋舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'势力战争','加达里合众国','巡洋舰','faction_500001.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92556,'合众国狞獾级','State Caracal','State Caracal','Caracal del Estado','Caracal de l''État','連合カラカル','연합 카라칼','State Caracal','合众国狞獾级','艘加达里海军狞獾级巡洋舰，负责保卫整个加达里-盖伦特战区内的关键军事控制点。','type_10050_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,440.0,10000000.0,NULL,1,0,1180,'势力战争加达里合众国巡洋舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'势力战争','加达里合众国','巡洋舰','faction_500001.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92557,'联邦狂怒者级','Federation Vexor','Federation Vexor','Vexor de la Federación','Vexor de la Fédération','連邦ベクサー','연방 벡서','Federation Vexor','联邦狂怒者级','一艘联邦海军狂怒者级巡洋舰，负责保卫整个盖伦特-加达里战区内的关键军事控制点。','type_9984_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,440.0,10000000.0,NULL,1,0,1181,'势力战争盖伦特联邦巡洋舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,5.0,7.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'势力战争','盖伦特联邦','巡洋舰','faction_500004.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92558,'检察员狂怒者级','Inspector Vexor','Inspector Vexor','Vexor de inspector','Vexor inspecteur','インスペクターベクサー','조사관 벡서','Inspector Vexor','检察员狂怒者级','一艘由联邦海军委任的狂怒者级巡洋舰专精型号，负责拦截任何威胁盖伦特-加达里战区内关键军事控制点的敌方力量。','type_9984_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,440.0,10000000.0,NULL,1,0,1181,'势力战争盖伦特联邦巡洋舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,5.0,7.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'势力战争','盖伦特联邦','巡洋舰','faction_500004.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92559,'共和国刺刀级','Republic Stabber','Republic Stabber','Stabber de la República','Stabber de la République','共和国スタッバー','공화국 스태버','Republic Stabber','共和国刺刀级','一艘共和舰队刺刀级巡洋舰，负责保卫整个米玛塔尔-艾玛战区内的关键军事控制点。','type_9978_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,440.0,10000000.0,NULL,1,0,1182,'势力战争米玛塔尔共和国巡洋舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,0.0,5.0,7.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'势力战争','米玛塔尔共和国','巡洋舰','faction_500002.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92560,'看护者刺刀级','Keeper Stabber','Keeper Stabber','Stabber de custodia','Stabber gardien','キーパースタッバー','보호자 스태버','Keeper Stabber','看护者刺刀级','一艘由共和舰队委任刺刀级巡洋舰专精型号，负责拦截任何威胁米玛塔尔-艾玛战区内关键军事控制点的敌方力量。','type_9978_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,440.0,10000000.0,NULL,1,0,1182,'势力战争米玛塔尔共和国巡洋舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,0.0,5.0,7.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'势力战争','米玛塔尔共和国','巡洋舰','faction_500002.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92565,'X级斜钨铅矿','Raspite X-Grade','Raspite X-Grade','Raspita de grado X','Raspite de catégorie X','ラスパイト（グレードX）','X급 라스파이트','Raspite X-Grade','X级斜钨铅矿','这种斜钨铅矿可以用在大规模建造项目中，大受艾玛工程师的欢迎。斜钨铅矿矿床一直作为储备保存，直到帝国需要它们时才启用。与普通斜钨铅矿不同，X级斜钨铅矿更加稳定，无需专用设备即可提炼为<a href=showinfo:34>三钛合金</a>和<a href=showinfo:35>类晶体胶矿</a>，同时还能产出对艾玛帝国具有价值的<a href=showinfo:92569>晶体斜钨铅矿</a>。','type_46252_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,21823,5083,'斜钨铅矿',25,'小行星',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92566,'X级复稀金矿','Polycrase X-Grade','Polycrase X-Grade','Policrasa de grado X','Polycrase de catégorie X','ポリクレース（グレードX）','X급 폴리크레이스','Polycrase X-Grade','X级复稀金矿','这种复稀金矿可以用在大规模建造项目中，大受加达里工程师的欢迎。复稀金矿矿床一直作为储备保存，直到合众国需要它们时才启用。与普通复稀金矿不同，X级复稀金矿更加稳定，无需专用设备即可提炼为<a href=showinfo:34>三钛合金</a>和<a href=showinfo:35>类晶体胶矿</a>，同时还能产出对加达里合众国具有价值的<a href=showinfo:92570>晶体复稀金矿</a>。','type_46252_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,21823,5084,'复稀金矿',25,'小行星',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92567,'X级碳硅石','Moissanite X-Grade','Moissanite X-Grade','Moissanita de grado X','Moissanite de catégorie X','モアサナイト（グレードX）','X급 모이사나이트','Moissanite X-Grade','X级碳硅石','这种碳硅石可以用在大规模建造项目中，大受盖伦特工程师的欢迎。碳硅石矿床一直作为储备保存，直到联邦需要它们时才启用。与普通碳硅石不同，X级碳硅石更加稳定，无需专用设备即可提炼为<a href=showinfo:34>三钛合金</a>和<a href=showinfo:35>类晶体胶矿</a>，同时还能产出对盖伦特联邦具有价值的<a href=showinfo:92571>晶体碳硅石</a>。','type_46252_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,21823,5085,'碳硅石',25,'小行星',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92568,'X级钪原矿','Kangite X-Grade','Kangite X-Grade','Kangita de grado X','Kangite de catégorie X','カンガイト（グレードX）','X급 켄자이트','Kangite X-Grade','X级钪原矿','这种钪原矿可以用在大规模建造项目中，大受米玛塔尔工程师的欢迎。钪原矿矿床一直作为储备保存，直到共和国需要它们时才启用。与普通钪原矿不同，X级钪原矿更加稳定，无需专用设备即可提炼为<a href=showinfo:34>三钛合金</a>和<a href=showinfo:35>类晶体胶矿</a>，同时还能产出对米玛塔尔共和国具有价值的<a href=showinfo:92572>晶体钪原矿</a>。','type_46252_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,21823,5086,'钪原矿',25,'小行星',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92569,'晶体斜钨铅矿','Crystalline Raspite','Crystalline Raspite','Raspita cristalina','Raspite cristalline','結晶性ラスパイト','결정성 라스파이트','Crystalline Raspite','晶体斜钨铅矿','提炼斜钨铅矿后产生的晶体残留物。艾玛帝国将奖励那些将这种矿物运送到位于<url=showinfo:5//30002974>莫哈托尔</url>的艾玛海军锚地空间站外、帝国贸易运输舰处的克隆飞行员。','type_92569_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,3848,19,27347,18,'矿物',4,'材料',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92570,'晶体复稀金矿','Crystalline Polycrase','Crystalline Polycrase','Policrasa cristalina','Polycrase cristallin','結晶性ポリクレース','결정성 폴리크레이스','Crystalline Polycrase','晶体复稀金矿','提炼复稀金矿后产生的晶体残留物。加达里合众国将奖励那些将这种矿物运送到位于<url=showinfo:5//30045324>欧拿蒙</url>的加达里海军锚地空间站外、合众国贸易运输舰处的克隆飞行员。','type_92570_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,3848,19,27349,18,'矿物',4,'材料',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92571,'晶体碳硅石','Crystalline Moissanite','Crystalline Moissanite','Moissanita cristalina','Moissanite cristalline','結晶性モアサナイト','결정성 모이사나이트','Crystalline Moissanite','晶体碳硅石','提炼碳硅石后产生的晶体残留物。盖伦特联邦将奖励那些将这种矿物运送到位于<url=showinfo:5//30003788>印塔基</url>的盖伦特海军锚地空间站外、联邦贸易运输舰处的克隆飞行员。','type_92571_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,3848,19,27350,18,'矿物',4,'材料',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92572,'晶体钪原矿','Crystalline Kangite','Crystalline Kangite','Kangita cristalina','Kangite cristalline','結晶性カンガイト','결정성 켄자이트','Crystalline Kangite','晶体钪原矿','提炼钪原矿后产生的晶体残留物。米玛塔尔共和国将奖励那些将这种矿物运送到位于<url=showinfo:5//30002055>阿莫</url>的米玛塔尔海军锚地空间站外、共和国贸易运输舰处的克隆飞行员。','type_92572_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,3848,19,27353,18,'矿物',4,'材料',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92605,'加达里战术中继站','Caldari Tactical Relay','Caldari Tactical Relay','Relé táctico caldari','Relais tactique caldari','カルダリ戦略的中継ステーション','칼다리 전술 통신 중계시설','Caldari Tactical Relay','加达里战术中继站','这个设施是加达里军事行动的信息中继站，负责收集和传送战场的情报。','type_10240_64.png',NULL,0,100000000.0,NULL,10000.0,100000.0,NULL,1,0,4033,'可摧毁的效果信标',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92673,'基础型一级科技侦察军事信标','Scout Basic Tech 1 Military Beacon','Scout Basic Tech 1 Military Beacon','Baliza militar de reconocimiento T1 básica','Balise militaire éclaireur basique Tech I','偵察用基本T1軍事ビーコン','정찰 기본 테크 I 군사 비컨','Scout Basic Tech 1 Military Beacon','基础型一级科技侦察军事信标','这个信标标志着一处侦察站军事设施。入口通道设定为可通行基础型一级科技战斗及攻击护卫舰。安装在这个加速轨道中的安全设备会阻止任何舰船使用装配的跃迁核心稳定器。','type_2335_64.png',NULL,0,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,NULL,1,0,310,'信标',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92678,'帝国斜钨铅矿贸易运输舰','Imperial Raspite Trade-In Transport','Imperial Raspite Trade-In Transport','Nave de intercambio de raspita imperial','Transport d''échange de raspite de l''Empire','帝国ラスパイト引き換え輸送船','제국 라스파이트 거래소','Imperial Raspite Trade-In Transport','帝国斜钨铅矿贸易运输舰','一艘帝国货舰，负责收集斜钨铅矿并将其运往帝国各地正在进行的建设项目。这艘舰船愿意用盈余货物来交换额外的晶体斜钨铅矿。','type_76003_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,0,226,'大型空间实体(LCO)',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92679,'合众国复稀金矿贸易运输舰','State Polycrase Trade-In Transport','State Polycrase Trade-In Transport','Nave de intercambio de policrasa del Estado','Transport d''échange de polycrase de l''État','連合ポリクレース引き換え輸送船','연합 폴리크레이스 거래소','State Polycrase Trade-In Transport','合众国复稀金矿贸易运输舰','一艘合众国货舰，负责收集复稀金矿并将其运往合众国各地正在进行的建设项目。这艘舰船愿意用盈余货物来交换额外的晶体复稀金矿。','type_73489_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,0,226,'大型空间实体(LCO)',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92680,'联邦碳硅石贸易运输舰','Federation Moissanite Trade-In Transport','Federation Moissanite Trade-In Transport','Nave de intercambio de moissanita de la Federación','Transport d''échange de moissanite de la Fédération','連邦モアサナイト引き換え輸送船','연방 모이사나이트 거래소','Federation Moissanite Trade-In Transport','联邦碳硅石贸易运输舰','一艘联邦货舰，负责收集碳硅石并将其运往联邦各地正在进行的建设项目。这艘舰船愿意用盈余货物来交换额外的晶体碳硅石。','type_73487_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,0,226,'大型空间实体(LCO)',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92681,'共和国钪原矿贸易运输舰','Republic Kangite Trade-In Transport','Republic Kangite Trade-In Transport','Nave de intercambio de kangita de la República','Transport d''échange de kangite de la République','共和国カンガイト引き換え輸送船','공화국 켄자이트 거래소','Republic Kangite Trade-In Transport','共和国钪原矿贸易运输舰','一艘共和国货舰，负责收集钪原矿并将其运往共和国各地正在进行的建设项目。这艘舰船愿意用盈余货物来交换额外的晶体钪原矿。','type_76006_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,0,226,'大型空间实体(LCO)',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92779,'磨难级海军型战争后备处中尉涂装','Crucifier Navy Issue War Reserves Lieutenant SKIN','Crucifier Navy Issue War Reserves Lieutenant SKIN','SKIN de Teniente de Reservas Militares para la Crucifier modelo de la Armada','SKIN Crucifier Navy Issue, édition Lieutenant des Réserves de guerre','クルセファー海軍仕様・帝国戦時予備貯蔵中尉SKIN','크루시파이어 해군 에디션 ''전시준비기관 중위'' SKIN','Crucifier Navy Issue War Reserves Lieutenant SKIN','磨难级海军型战争后备处中尉涂装','帝国战争后备处的采矿行动通常由海军和物流人员联合实施，并由一名红衣尉官坐镇指挥。帝国战争后备处是艾玛国土评估局和军务处联合成立的，旨在建立并维护大量的重要战略物资储备。该军团负责在艾玛帝国境内探测资源并组织开采行动。','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,2000,1,0,1950,'永久涂装',91,'涂装',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92791,'毛鲁斯级海军型战略军需处防御者涂装','Maulus Navy Issue Strategic Materiel Defender SKIN','Maulus Navy Issue Strategic Materiel Defender SKIN','SKIN de Defensor de Material Estratégico para la Maulus modelo de la Armada','SKIN Maulus Navy Issue, édition Défenseur du Matériel stratégique','マウルス海軍仕様・連邦戦略物資局ディフェンダーSKIN','마울러스 해군 에디션 ''전략물자원 디펜더'' SKIN','Maulus Navy Issue Strategic Materiel Defender SKIN','毛鲁斯级海军型战略军需处防御者涂装','联邦战略军需处的探索和采矿行动通常由一名在工程和物流领域有专长的防御者尉官来指挥。联邦战略军需处由盖伦特联邦总统杰科斯·莱登下令组建，旨在寻找和开采盖伦特境内的重要军事资源。联邦战略军需处对发现的资源进行开采作业已经成为了联邦一道常见的风景线。','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,2000,1,0,1950,'永久涂装',91,'涂装',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92797,'守夜者级舰队型舰队军械处之矛涂装','Vigil Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','Vigil Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','SKIN de Astilla de Artillería de la Flota para la Vigil modelo de la Flota','SKIN Vigil Fleet Issue, édition Piquier du Ravitaillement de la flotte','ヴィジリ海軍仕様・共和国海軍軍需品部スパイクSKIN','비질 함대 에디션 ''함대 군수지원부 소위'' SKIN','Vigil Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','守夜者级舰队型舰队军械处之矛涂装','共和舰队军械处的采矿和运输行动由一名技术官员指挥，通常具有尖刀尉官官衔。共和舰队军械处负责获取一切对建造共和舰队所需武器装备有用处的材料。共和舰队军械处首先派出资源探查队寻找有用的小行星，然后进行开采作业来获取任何有价值的矿物。','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,2000,1,0,1950,'永久涂装',91,'涂装',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92798,'刺刀级舰队型舰队军械处之矛涂装','Stabber Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','Stabber Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','SKIN de Astilla de Artillería de la Flota para la Stabber modelo de la Flota','SKIN Stabber Fleet Issue, édition Piquier du Ravitaillement de la flotte','スタッバー海軍仕様・共和国海軍軍需品部スパイクSKIN','스태버 함대 에디션 ''함대 군수지원부 소위'' SKIN','Stabber Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','刺刀级舰队型舰队军械处之矛涂装','共和舰队军械处的采矿和运输行动由一名技术官员指挥，通常具有尖刀尉官官衔。共和舰队军械处负责获取一切对建造共和舰队所需武器装备有用处的材料。共和舰队军械处首先派出资源探查队寻找有用的小行星，然后进行开采作业来获取任何有价值的矿物。','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,2063,1,0,1950,'永久涂装',91,'涂装',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92800,'飓风级舰队型舰队军械处之矛涂装','Cyclone Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','Cyclone Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','SKIN de Astilla de Artillería de la Flota para la Cyclone modelo de la Flota','SKIN Cyclone Fleet Issue, édition Piquier du Ravitaillement de la flotte','サイクロン海軍仕様・共和国海軍軍需品部スパイクSKIN','사이클론 함대 에디션 ''함대 군수지원부 소위'' SKIN','Cyclone Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','飓风级舰队型舰队军械处之矛涂装','共和舰队军械处的采矿和运输行动由一名技术官员指挥，通常具有尖刀尉官官衔。共和舰队军械处负责获取一切对建造共和舰队所需武器装备有用处的材料。共和舰队军械处首先派出资源探查队寻找有用的小行星，然后进行开采作业来获取任何有价值的矿物。','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,2103,1,0,1950,'永久涂装',91,'涂装',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92801,'狂暴级舰队型舰队军械处之矛涂装','Tempest Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','Tempest Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','SKIN de Astilla de Artillería de la Flota para la Tempest modelo de la Flota','SKIN Tempest Fleet Issue, édition Piquier du Ravitaillement de la flotte','テンペスト海軍仕様・共和国海軍軍需品部スパイクSKIN','템페스트 함대 에디션 ''함대 군수지원부 소위'' SKIN','Tempest Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','狂暴级舰队型舰队军械处之矛涂装','共和舰队军械处的采矿和运输行动由一名技术官员指挥，通常具有尖刀尉官官衔。共和舰队军械处负责获取一切对建造共和舰队所需武器装备有用处的材料。共和舰队军械处首先派出资源探查队寻找有用的小行星，然后进行开采作业来获取任何有价值的矿物。','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,2108,1,0,1950,'永久涂装',91,'涂装',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92802,'台风级舰队型舰队军械处之矛涂装','Typhoon Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','Typhoon Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','SKIN de Astilla de Artillería de la Flota para la Typhoon modelo de la Flota','SKIN Typhoon Fleet Issue, édition Piquier du Ravitaillement de la flotte','タイフーン海軍仕様・共和国海軍軍需品部スパイクSKIN','타이푼 함대 에디션 ''함대 군수지원부 소위'' SKIN','Typhoon Fleet Issue Fleet Ordnance Spike SKIN','台风级舰队型舰队军械处之矛涂装','共和舰队军械处的采矿和运输行动由一名技术官员指挥，通常具有尖刀尉官官衔。共和舰队军械处负责获取一切对建造共和舰队所需武器装备有用处的材料。共和舰队军械处首先派出资源探查队寻找有用的小行星，然后进行开采作业来获取任何有价值的矿物。','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,2108,1,0,1950,'永久涂装',91,'涂装',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92818,'高密度斜钨铅矿（5级）','Compressed Raspite X-Grade','Compressed Raspite X-Grade','Raspita comprimida de grado X','Raspite de catégorie X compriméee','圧縮ラスパイト（グレードX）','X급 압축된 라스파이트','Compressed Raspite X-Grade','高密度斜钨铅矿（5级）','这种斜钨铅矿可以用在大规模建造项目中，大受艾玛工程师的欢迎。斜钨铅矿矿床一直作为储备保存，直到帝国需要它们时才启用。与普通斜钨铅矿不同，X级斜钨铅矿更加稳定，无需专用设备即可提炼为<a href=showinfo:34>三钛合金</a>和<a href=showinfo:35>类晶体胶矿</a>，同时还能产出对艾玛帝国具有价值的<a href=showinfo:92569>晶体斜钨铅矿</a>。这种矿物被压缩过，比它的原始形态紧密得多。','type_28406_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,3313,5083,'斜钨铅矿',25,'小行星',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92819,'高密度复稀金矿（5级）','Compressed Polycrase X-Grade','Compressed Polycrase X-Grade','Policrasa comprimida de grado X','Polycrase de catégorie X comprimé','圧縮ポリクレース（グレードX）','X급 압축된 폴리크레이스','Compressed Polycrase X-Grade','高密度复稀金矿（5级）','这种复稀金矿可以用在大规模建造项目中，大受加达里工程师的欢迎。复稀金矿矿床一直作为储备保存，直到合众国需要它们时才启用。与普通复稀金矿不同，X级复稀金矿更加稳定，无需专用设备即可提炼为<a href=showinfo:34>三钛合金</a>和<a href=showinfo:35>类晶体胶矿</a>，同时还能产出对加达里合众国具有价值的<a href=showinfo:92570>晶体复稀金矿</a>。这种矿物被压缩过，比它的原始形态紧密得多。','type_28406_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,3313,5084,'复稀金矿',25,'小行星',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92820,'高密度碳硅石（5级）','Compressed Moissanite X-Grade','Compressed Moissanite X-Grade','Moissanita comprimida de grado X','Moissanite de catégorie X comprimée','圧縮モアサナイト（グレードX）','X급 압축된 모이사나이트','Compressed Moissanite X-Grade','高密度碳硅石（5级）','这种碳硅石可以用在大规模建造项目中，大受盖伦特工程师的欢迎。碳硅石矿床一直作为储备保存，直到联邦需要它们时才启用。与普通碳硅石不同，X级碳硅石更加稳定，无需专用设备即可提炼为<a href=showinfo:34>三钛合金</a>和<a href=showinfo:35>类晶体胶矿</a>，同时还能产出对盖伦特联邦具有价值的<a href=showinfo:92571>晶体碳硅石</a>。这种矿物被压缩过，比它的原始形态紧密得多。','type_28406_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,3313,5085,'碳硅石',25,'小行星',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92821,'高密度钪原矿（5级）','Compressed Kangite X-Grade','Compressed Kangite X-Grade','Kangita comprimida de grado X','Kangite de catégorie X comprimée','圧縮カンガイト（グレードX）','X급 압축된 켄자이트','Compressed Kangite X-Grade','高密度钪原矿（5级）','这种钪原矿可以用在大规模建造项目中，大受米玛塔尔工程师的欢迎。钪原矿矿床一直作为储备保存，直到共和国需要它们时才启用。与普通钪原矿不同，X级钪原矿更加稳定，无需专用设备即可提炼为<a href=showinfo:34>三钛合金</a>和<a href=showinfo:35>类晶体胶矿</a>，同时还能产出对米玛塔尔共和国具有价值的<a href=showinfo:92572>晶体钪原矿</a>。这种矿物被压缩过，比它的原始形态紧密得多。','type_28406_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,1.0e+35,3849,1,3313,5086,'钪原矿',25,'小行星',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,100,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92822,'救赎级','Salvation','Salvation','Salvación','Salvation','サルベーション','셀베이션','Salvation','救赎级','YC128年“战争之路”冲突尘埃落定后，艾玛帝国边缘地区的许多小型领地陷入了混乱。米玛塔尔共和国突击队的持续打击，让这些地区暴露在海盗的威胁之下，内部叛乱一触即发。当地的领主们希望找到一种办法，依靠自己的舰队重新控制局面。与帝国海军不同，这些舰队主要由中小型舰船组成。他们需要一种既能提升舰队作战效率，又能展现背后帝国强大实力的方法。天主凝聚会针对这个问题给出的解决方案，就是“救赎级”。这是一艘拥有强大指挥脉冲波功能的高级支援航母，它能将一群小船提升为一支势不可挡的舰队。','type_92822_64.png',NULL,1,13950000.0,1300000.0,2925.0,1260000000.0,3856,2,0,5120,'指挥航母',6,'舰船',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,6,4,8,2,0,0,23757,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92823,'西莫夫级','Simurgh','Simurgh','Simurgh','Simurgh','シムルグ','시무르그','Simurgh','西莫夫级','YC128 年，在被印塔基辛迪加背叛之后，加达里合众国吞并了整个辛迪加地区。然而，吞并行动并没有终结该地区的混乱局面。CEO合作组织宣称，长期以来，犯罪组织一直在滥用辛迪加的灰色产业为其自身目的服务。他们命令加达里海军在这片地区重新建立法治。为了支持这一行动，卡拉吉塔集团开发了“西莫夫级”。它卓越的作战能力，是辛迪加地区的犯罪势力无法抗衡的威胁。作为一个拥有先进作战能力的移动指挥中心，它的使命就是将荣誉带到这片无法无天的太空区域。','type_92823_64.png',NULL,1,11925000.0,1300000.0,3310.0,1270000000.0,3859,2,0,5120,'指挥航母',6,'舰船',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,6,8,4,2,0,0,23915,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92824,'盖亚级','Gaia','Gaia','Gaia','Gaia','ガイア','가이아','Gaia','盖亚级','YC128年“战争之路”冲突伊始，阿利克斯·莫罗总统预见到，卓越的舰队支援将是未来交战的关键。因此，她联系了度沃勒实验室，委托他们设计一款更先进的航母。度沃勒实验室的团队获得了前所未有的舰队遥感研究数据访问权限，以指导他们的设计决策。他们的任务是制造一艘能体现先进作战情报对舰队具有“挽救生命”般影响力的舰船。这艘舰船将成为莫罗总统所构想且更具创新精神的盖伦特未来旗舰。','type_92824_64.png',NULL,1,13095000.0,1300000.0,3625.0,1220000000.0,3861,2,0,5120,'指挥航母',6,'舰船',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,6,5,7,2,0,0,23911,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92825,'伊米尔级','Ymir','Ymir','Ymir','Ymir','ユミル','이미르','Ymir','伊米尔级','随着YC128年冲突的升级，赛毕斯托阿卡萨·米杜拉司令呼吁“核心局面公司”打造一个更高级的作战平台，以支援她认为对米玛塔尔在接下来战争中取得胜利至关重要的快速反应舰队。核心局面公司在尼铎格尔级的经典设计基础上，利用最新的舰队支援技术对其进行了升级。卓越的指挥支援技术，能显著提升其舰队成员的速度与生存能力。它完美体现了共和国的军事理念，并融合了核心局面公司与赛毕斯托部族引以为傲的尖端技术。','type_92825_64.png',NULL,1,11250000.0,1300000.0,3775.0,1230000000.0,3863,2,0,5120,'指挥航母',6,'舰船',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,6,7,5,2,0,0,24483,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92857,'中型海军军事信标','Moderate Navy Military Beacon','Moderate Navy Military Beacon','Baliza militar moderada de la Armada','Balise militaire Navy modérée','標準海軍軍事ビーコン','중급 해군 군사 비컨','Moderate Navy Military Beacon','中型海军军事信标','该信标标记一处中型军事设施。入口通道设定为可通行一级科技和船型小于或等于战列巡洋舰的帝国势力海军舰船。安装在这个加速轨道中的安全设备会阻止任何舰船使用装配的跃迁核心稳定器。','type_2335_64.png',NULL,0,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,NULL,1,0,310,'信标',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92877,'被占领的非活跃帝国研究中继站','Captured Inactive Imperial Research Relay','Captured Inactive Imperial Research Relay','Relé de investigación imperial inactivo capturado','Relais de recherche inactif de l''Empire capturé','制圧された帝国の研究中継施設（停止中）','점령한 비활성화된 제국 연구시설','Captured Inactive Imperial Research Relay','被占领的非活跃帝国研究中继站','该研究中继站当前处于非活跃状态。可以通过向中继站提供<a href=showinfo:92572>钪原矿晶体</a>来将其激活','type_29311_64.png',NULL,0,1000.0,NULL,1000.0,1000.0,NULL,1,0,226,'大型空间实体(LCO)',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92880,'被占领的非活跃共和国研究中继站','Captured Inactive Republic Research Relay','Captured Inactive Republic Research Relay','Relé de investigación de la República inactivo capturado','Relais de recherche inactif de la République capturé','制圧された共和国の研究中継施設（停止中）','점령한 비활성화된 공화국 연구시설','Captured Inactive Republic Research Relay','被占领的非活跃共和国研究中继站','该研究中继站当前处于非活跃状态。可以通过向中继站提供<a href=showinfo:92569>斜钨铅矿晶体</a>来将其激活','type_29423_64.png',NULL,0,1000.0,NULL,1000.0,1000.0,NULL,1,0,226,'大型空间实体(LCO)',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92881,'被占领的非活跃帝国研究中继站','Occupied Inactive Imperial Research Relay','Occupied Inactive Imperial Research Relay','Relé de investigación imperial inactivo ocupado','Relais de recherche inactif de l''Empire occupé','占領された帝国の研究中継施設（停止中）','비활성화된 제국 연구시설 점령함','Occupied Inactive Imperial Research Relay','被占领的非活跃帝国研究中继站','该研究中继站当前处于非活跃状态。可以通过向中继站提供<a href=showinfo:92572>斜钨铅矿晶体</a>来将其激活。已加入米玛塔尔共和国的克隆飞行员可在中继站保持非活跃状态时，使用数据分析仪夺取该设施的控制权。','type_29311_64.png',NULL,0,1000.0,NULL,1000.0,1000.0,NULL,1,0,226,'大型空间实体(LCO)',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(92882,'被占领的非活跃合众国研究中继站','Occupied Inactive State Research Relay','Occupied Inactive State Research Relay','Relé de investigación del Estado inactivo ocupado','Relais de recherche inactif de l''État occupé','占領された連合の研究中継施設（停止中）','비활성화된 연합 연구시설 점령함','Occupied Inactive State Research Relay','被占领的非活跃合众国研究中继站','该研究中继站当前处于非活跃状态。可以通过向中继站提供<a href=showinfo:92572>复稀金矿晶体</a>来将其激活。已加入盖伦特联邦的克隆飞行员可在中继站保持非活跃状态时，使用数据分析仪夺取该设施的控制权。','type_29421_64.png',NULL,0,1000.0,NULL,1000.0,1000.0,NULL,1,0,226,'大型空间实体(LCO)',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93090,'帝国忏悔者级','Imperial Confessor','Imperial Confessor','Confessor imperial','Confessor impérial','帝国コンフェッサー','제국 컨페서','Imperial Confessor','帝国忏悔者级','一艘艾玛海军忏悔者级战术驱逐舰，负责保卫整个艾玛-米玛塔尔战区内的关键军事控制点。','type_55812_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,375.0,1650000.0,NULL,1,0,1175,'势力战争艾玛帝国驱逐舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,7.0,5.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'势力战争','艾玛帝国','驱逐舰','faction_500003.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93091,'弃世者忏悔者级','Renouncer Confessor','Renouncer Confessor','Confessor de renunciante','Confessor renonciateur','リナウンサーコンフェッサー','의절관 컨페서','Renouncer Confessor','弃世者忏悔者级','一艘由艾玛海军委任的忏悔者级战术驱逐舰专精型号，负责拦截任何威胁艾玛-米玛塔尔战区内关键军事控制点的敌方力量。','type_55812_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,375.0,1650000.0,NULL,1,0,1175,'势力战争艾玛帝国驱逐舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,7.0,5.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'势力战争','艾玛帝国','驱逐舰','faction_500003.png');

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93100,'看护者斯威普级','Keeper Svipul','Keeper Svipul','Svipul de custodia','Svipul gardien','キーパースヴィプル','보호자 스비풀','Keeper Svipul','看护者斯威普级','一艘由共和舰队委任的斯威普级战术驱逐舰专精型号，负责拦截任何威胁米玛塔尔-艾玛战区内关键军事控制点的敌方力量。','type_93099_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,375.0,1650000.0,NULL,1,0,1178,'势力战争米玛塔尔共和国驱逐舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,0.0,5.0,7.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'势力战争','米玛塔尔共和国','驱逐舰','faction_500002.png');

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93105,'小型专家军事信标','Small Elite Military Beacon','Small Elite Military Beacon','Baliza militar pequeña de élite','Petite balise militaire d''élite','小型エリート軍事ビーコン','소형 엘리트 군사 비컨','Small Elite Military Beacon','小型专家军事信标','该信标标记一处小型专家军事设施。入口通道设定为允许所有小于等于驱逐舰、任意科技等级的舰船通行。安装在这个加速轨道中的安全设备会阻止任何舰船使用装配的跃迁核心稳定器。','type_2335_64.png',NULL,0,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,NULL,1,0,310,'信标',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

UPDATE types SET description='这款增效剂由艾玛帝国生产，用于协助他们的秘密研究行动。<b>+3%能量炮台追踪速度，+3%无人机追踪速度和移动速度。基础持续时间：2小时。</b><b>过期时间：YC128年6月9日</b>' WHERE type_id=93129;
UPDATE types SET description='这款增效剂由艾玛帝国生产，用于协助他们的秘密研究行动。<b>+6%能量炮台追踪速度，+6%无人机追踪速度和移动速度。基础持续时间：2小时。</b><b>过期时间：YC128年6月9日</b>' WHERE type_id=93130;
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93143,'“冥王”原型采矿无人机','Prototype ''Pluto'' Mining Drone','Prototype ''Pluto'' Mining Drone','Dron minero Pluto prototipo','Prototype de drone d''extraction ''Pluto''','プロトタイプ「プルート」採掘専門ドローン','프로토타입 ''플루토'' 채굴 드론','Prototype ''Pluto'' Mining Drone','“冥王”原型采矿无人机','由西顿工业基于ORE的“采掘者”采矿无人机设计，并融合实验性自由无人机技术开发的原型无人机。采集协议被修改为更接近自由无人机的行为模式——它们在打捞和回收材料带回自由无人机巢穴时会更加高效。其结果是采矿过程效率更高，产生的残渣更少，但速度较慢，导致单位时间内的采矿产量较低。目前，由于该无人机技术存在缺陷，次品率较高，因此不适合大规模生产。西顿工业希望通过从盖伦特联邦军事行动“自由之刃”中获取的知识，加深对这一过程的理解。','type_41030_64.png',NULL,1,1100.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,158,4,0,101,'采矿无人机',18,'无人机',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,10246,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93144,'“冥王”原型采矿无人机蓝图','Prototype ''Pluto'' Mining Drone Blueprint','Prototype ''Pluto'' Mining Drone Blueprint','Plano de dron minero Pluto prototipo','Plan de construction Prototype de drone d''extraction ''Pluto''','プロトタイプ「プルート」採掘専門ドローン設計図','프로토타입 ''플루토'' 채굴 드론 블루프린트','Prototype ''Pluto'' Mining Drone Blueprint','“冥王”原型采矿无人机蓝图','','type_43915_64.png','type_43915_bpc_64.png',1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,4,0,177,'采矿无人机蓝图',9,'蓝图',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93145,'“冥王”原型冰矿采集无人机','Prototype ''Pluto'' Ice Harvesting Drone','Prototype ''Pluto'' Ice Harvesting Drone','Dron recolector de hielo Pluto prototipo','Prototype de Drone collecteur de glace ''Pluto''','プロトタイプ「プルート」アイス採掘ドローン','프로토타입 ''플루토'' 아이스 채굴 드론','Prototype ''Pluto'' Ice Harvesting Drone','“冥王”原型冰矿采集无人机','由西顿工业基于ORE的“采掘者”采矿无人机设计，并融合实验性自由无人机技术开发的原型无人机。采集协议被修改为更接近自由无人机的行为模式——它们在打捞和回收材料带回自由无人机巢穴时会更加高效。其结果是采矿过程效率更高，产生的残渣更少，但速度较慢，导致单位时间内的采矿产量较低。目前，由于该无人机技术存在缺陷，次品率较高，因此不适合大规模生产。西顿工业希望通过从盖伦特联邦军事行动“自由之刃”中获取的知识，加深对这一过程的理解。','type_43681_64.png',NULL,1,1100.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,158,4,0,101,'采矿无人机',18,'无人机',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,43699,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93148,'FW Complex - Small Interceptor-1 - Occupier Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','FW Complex - Small Interceptor-1 - Occupier Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','FW Complex - Small Interceptor-1 - Occupier Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','FW Complex - Small Interceptor-1 - Occupier Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','FW Complex - Small Interceptor-1 - Occupier Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','FW Complex - Small Interceptor-1 - Occupier Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','FW Complex - Small Interceptor-1 - Occupier Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','FW Complex - Small Interceptor-1 - Occupier Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','FW Complex - Small Interceptor-1 - Occupier Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','','type_2011_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,0,227,'云状星体',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93149,'小型截击舰军事信标','Small Interceptor Military Beacon','Small Interceptor Military Beacon','Baliza militar pequeña de interceptor','Petite balise militaire d''intercepteur','小型要撃型フリゲート軍事ビーコン','소형 인터셉터 군사 비컨','Small Interceptor Military Beacon','小型截击舰军事信标','这个信标标记小型的军事设施。入口通道设定为仅允许截击舰通过。安装在这个加速轨道中的安全设备会阻止任何舰船使用装配的跃迁核心稳定器。','type_2335_64.png',NULL,0,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,NULL,1,0,310,'信标',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
UPDATE types SET name='Subcapital Operations', de_name='Subcapital Operations', en_name='Subcapital Operations', es_name='Subcapital Operations', fr_name='Subcapital Operations', ja_name='Subcapital Operations', ko_name='Subcapital Operations', ru_name='Subcapital Operations', zh_name='Subcapital Operations', description='<font size="14"><b>Secrets Operations Expert System</b></font>'||X'0a0a'
||'This Expert System has been loaded with advanced ship operation skills, to mimic the experience of an Omega capsuleer.'||X'0a0a'
||'An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active <b>1 day</b> rental period. '||X'0a'
||'As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.'||X'0a0a'
||'<font size="14"><b>Activating an Expert System</b></font>'||X'0a0a'
||'Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.'||X'0a0a'
||'<i>Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar''s HyperNet.</i>' WHERE type_id=93150;
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93189,'内务部咒逐级','MIO Anathema','MIO Anathema','Anathema del MOI','Anathema du MIO','MIOアナシマ','제국 공안부 아나테마','MIO Anathema','内务部咒逐级','一艘隶属于艾玛帝国秘密机构“内务部”的护卫舰。其任务是保护米玛塔尔共和国境内针对机密数据传输的秘密行动。','type_24293_64.png',NULL,0,26500.0,NULL,265.0,1430000.0,NULL,1,0,1169,'势力战争艾玛帝国护卫舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,4.0,4.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'势力战争','艾玛帝国','护卫舰','faction_500003.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93190,'国家档案所秃鹰级','HoR Buzzard','HoR Buzzard','Buzzard de la OR','Buzzard de la HoR','HoRバザード','정보기록원 버자드','HoR Buzzard','国家档案所秃鹰级','一艘隶属于加达里合众国秘密机构“国家档案所”的护卫舰。其任务是保护盖伦特联邦境内针对机密数据传输的秘密行动。','type_20379_64.png',NULL,0,26500.0,NULL,265.0,1430000.0,NULL,1,0,1167,'势力战争加达里合众国护卫舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,4.0,4.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'势力战争','加达里合众国','护卫舰','faction_500001.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93191,'联邦情报局太阳神级','FIO Helios','FIO Helios','Helios de la OIF','Helios du FIO','FIOヘリオス','연방 정보부 헬리오스','FIO Helios','联邦情报局太阳神级','一艘隶属于盖伦特联邦秘密机构“联邦情报局”的护卫舰。其任务是保护加达里合众国境内针对机密数据传输的秘密行动。','type_22679_64.png',NULL,0,26500.0,NULL,265.0,1430000.0,NULL,1,0,1168,'势力战争盖伦特联邦护卫舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,4.0,4.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'势力战争','盖伦特联邦','护卫舰','faction_500004.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93192,'共和安全局猎豹级','RSS Cheetah','RSS Cheetah','Cheetah de los SSR','Cheetah des RSS','RSSチーター','공화국 안보부 치타','RSS Cheetah','共和安全局猎豹级','一艘隶属于米玛塔尔共和国秘密机构“共和安全局”的护卫舰。其任务是保护艾玛帝国境内针对机密数据传输的秘密行动。','type_76017_64.png',NULL,0,26500.0,NULL,265.0,1430000.0,NULL,1,0,1166,'势力战争米玛塔尔共和国护卫舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,3.0,2.0,3.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'势力战争','米玛塔尔共和国','护卫舰','faction_500002.png');

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93312,'共和国死亡漩涡级','Rebellion Maelstrom','Rebellion Maelstrom','Maelstrom de la rebelión','Maelstrom de la rébellion','反乱勢力メイルストローム','저항군 마엘스트롬','Rebellion Maelstrom','共和国死亡漩涡级','作为米玛塔尔解放战争中的前线战斗力量，这艘漩涡级战列舰在玛塔尔脱离帝国控制之前绝不会停止战斗。','type_3781_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,235.0,15300000.0,NULL,1,0,1667,'叛道者战列舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,0.0,36.0,60.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','米玛塔尔共和国','战列舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93313,'帝国铁骑舰载机','Imperial Fighter','Imperial Fighter','Caza imperial','Chasseur impérial','帝国艦載戦闘機','제국 파이터','Imperial Fighter','帝国铁骑舰载机','一架圣殿骑士级铁骑舰载机，宣誓保护他们的总督及其万古级超级航母。','type_default.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,135.0,1190000.0,NULL,1,0,1454,'叛道者铁骑舰载机',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,10.0,6.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','任务通用','巡洋舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93314,'总督万古级','Governor Aeon','Governor Aeon','Aeon del gobernador','Aeon du gouverneur','総督イーオン','총독의 에이온','Governor Aeon','总督万古级','一艘由帝国总督朱利亚诺·科尔维诺斯指挥的万古级超级航母。在他统治玛塔尔期间，这个暴戾统治者对当地人民施加了无数的恐怖。','type_default.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,300.0,1300000.0,NULL,1,0,1731,'叛道者超级航母',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','任务通用','航空母舰','faction_500021.png');

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93609,'帝国战争后备处补给包','Imperial War Reserves Supply Package','Imperial War Reserves Supply Package','Paquete de suministros de Reservas Militares Imperiales','Pack d''approvisionnement des Réserves de guerre impériales','帝国戦時予備貯蔵補給品パッケージ','제국 전시준비기관 지원 물품','Imperial War Reserves Supply Package','帝国战争后备处补给包','由帝国战争后备处集团采购和制造的补给包。旨在向前线的艾玛帝国运送关键军事物资。米玛塔尔共和国将奖励那些截获这些补给包并将其运送到部族解放力量空间站的克隆飞行员，需前往忠诚点商店兑换。','type_53530_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,0.01,20,1,24297,314,'其他',17,'常用物品',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93610,'合众国军事储备处补给包','State Military Stockpile Supply Package','State Military Stockpile Supply Package','Paquete de suministros de Reservas Militares del Estado','Pack d''approvisionnement des Réserves militaires d''état','連合軍事備蓄補給品パッケージ','연합 군사물자기관 지원 물품','State Military Stockpile Supply Package','合众国军事储备处补给包','由合众国军事储备处集团采购和制造的补给包。旨在向前线的加达里合众国运送关键军事物资。盖伦特联邦将奖励那些截获这些补给包并将其运送到联邦防务联合会空间站的克隆飞行员，需前往忠诚点商店兑换。','type_53531_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,0.01,20,1,24299,314,'其他',17,'常用物品',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93611,'联邦战略军需处补给包','Federal Strategic Materiel Supply Package','Federal Strategic Materiel Supply Package','Paquete de suministros de Material Estratégico Federal','Pack d''approvisionnement du Matériel stratégique fédéral','連邦戦略物資局補給品パッケージ','연방 전략물자원 지원 물품','Federal Strategic Materiel Supply Package','联邦战略军需处补给包','由联邦战略军需处集团采购和制造的补给包。旨在向前线的盖伦特联邦运送关键军事物资。加达里合众国将奖励那些截获这些补给包并将其运送到合众国护卫军空间站的克隆飞行员，需前往忠诚点商店兑换。','type_53532_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,0.01,20,1,24298,314,'其他',17,'常用物品',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93612,'共和舰队军械处补给包','Republic Fleet Ordnance Supply Package','Republic Fleet Ordnance Supply Package','Paquete de suministros de Artillería de la Flota de la República','Pack d''approvisionnement du Ravitaillement de la Flotte de la République','共和国海軍軍需品部補給品パッケージ','공화국 함대 군수지원부 지원 물품','Republic Fleet Ordnance Supply Package','共和舰队军械处补给包','由共和舰队军械处集团采购和制造的补给包。旨在向前线的米玛塔尔共和国运送关键军事物资。艾玛帝国将奖励那些截获这些补给包并将其运送到帝国圣战十字第二十四军团空间站的克隆飞行员，需前往忠诚点商店兑换。','type_53533_64.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,0.01,20,1,24300,314,'其他',17,'常用物品',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93650,'加速轨道','Acceleration Gate','Acceleration Gate','Portal de aceleración','Portail d''accélération','アクセラレーションゲート','액셀레이션 게이트','Acceleration Gate','加速轨道','加速轨道技术可以追溯到很久以前，当时从EVE之门坍塌中幸存的各帝国正开始向外扩张。虽然各星门的设置可能会在传送飞船尺寸以及是否需要通行钥匙或密码等方面存在差异，但它们都有着共同的基本功能，那就是把太空飞船推进到星系内的目的地信标处。','type_default.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,NULL,100000.0,NULL,1,0,366,'跃迁门',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93883,'努拉斯的神示级','Nuras'' Revelation','Nuras'' Revelation','Revelation de Nuras','Revelation de Nuras','ヌラスのレベレーション','누라스의 레벨레이션','Nuras'' Revelation','努拉斯的神示级','在与朱庇特的战斗中遭受重创后，这艘神示级帝国无畏舰已重返战场，为神圣艾玛而战。','type_default.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,300.0,1300000.0,NULL,1,0,1724,'叛道者无畏舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,900.0,600.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','任务通用','无畏舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93884,'叛乱狂暴级','Rebellion Tempest','Rebellion Tempest','Tempest de rebelión','Tempest de la Rébellion','反乱勢力テンペスト','저항군 템페스트','Rebellion Tempest','叛乱狂暴级','作为米玛塔尔解放战争中的前线战斗力量，这艘狂暴级战列舰在玛塔尔脱离帝国控制之前绝不会停止战斗。','type_639_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,235.0,15300000.0,NULL,1,0,1667,'叛道者战列舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,0.0,36.0,60.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','势力特属','战列舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93885,'叛乱台风级','Rebellion Typhoon','Rebellion Typhoon','Typhoon de rebelión','Typhoon de la Rébellion','反乱勢力タイフーン','저항군 타이푼','Rebellion Typhoon','叛乱台风级','作为米玛塔尔解放战争中的前线战斗力量，这艘台风级战列舰在玛塔尔脱离帝国控制之前绝不会停止战斗。','type_644_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,235.0,15300000.0,NULL,1,0,1667,'叛道者战列舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,0.0,36.0,60.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','任务通用','战列舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93888,'联邦俄洛巴斯级','Federation Erebus','Federation Erebus','Erebus de la Federación','Erebus de la Fédération','連邦エレバス','연방 에레버스','Federation Erebus','联邦俄洛巴斯级','为自由、正义和盖伦特之道而战，这艘俄洛巴斯级泰坦的任务是让印塔基人民夺回他们的星球。','type_671_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,300.0,1300000.0,NULL,1,0,1759,'叛道者泰坦',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,600.0,900.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','其他','泰坦','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93899,'旗舰纳迦法级','Flagship Naglfar','Flagship Naglfar','Nave insignia Naglfar','Naglfar amiral','旗艦ナグルファー','기함 나글파','Flagship Naglfar','旗舰纳迦法级','这艘纳迦法级无畏舰是米玛塔尔叛乱领袖们的旗舰。他们计划利用这艘舰船，将异端邪说传播到整个帝国。','type_default.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,300.0,1300000.0,NULL,1,0,1724,'叛道者无畏舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,900.0,600.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','任务通用','无畏舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93900,'执行防御加农炮','Executive Defense Cannon','Executive Defense Cannon','Cañón defensivo ejecutivo','Canon de défense exécutif','エグゼクティブ防衛キャノン','임원 방어 캐논','Executive Defense Cannon','执行防御加农炮','一个由高级超级集团控制的行星级防御磁轨炮。','type_default.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,10000.0,1000.0,NULL,1,0,383,'可击毁的岗哨炮',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,9.0,15.0,3.0,3.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','任务通用','巡洋舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93908,'加达里海军导弹制导增强器','Caldari Navy Missile Guidance Enhancer','Caldari Navy Missile Guidance Enhancer','Intensificador de guiado de misiles de la Armada Caldari','Optimisateur de guidage de missiles de la Caldari Navy','カルダリ海軍ミサイル誘導エンハンサー','칼다리 해군 미사일 유도 향상장치','Caldari Navy Missile Guidance Enhancer','加达里海军导弹制导增强器','增加导弹射程并提高精确度。惩罚：在一艘舰船上使用多个这类装备或多个与该装备作用一致的类似装备将削弱实际使用效果。','type_93908_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,30.0,2033,4,21439,1395,'导弹制导增强器',7,'装备',1.0,10.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,35770,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93913,'帝国海军“救赎”索敌增强器','Imperial Navy ''Atonement'' Tracking Enhancer','Imperial Navy ''Atonement'' Tracking Enhancer','Intensificador de rastreo Atonement de la Armada Imperial','Optimisateur de suivi ''Atonement'' de l''Imperial Navy','帝国海軍「アトーンメント」トラッキングエンハンサー','제국 해군 ''속죄'' 트래킹 향상장치','Imperial Navy ''Atonement'' Tracking Enhancer','帝国海军“救赎”索敌增强器','提升炮台的射程，并提高其跟踪速度。该装备还能降低<b>能量炮台</b>的启用消耗。惩罚：在一艘舰船上使用多个这类装备或多个与该装备作用一致的类似装备将削弱实际使用效果。','type_14100_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,30.0,707,4,1640,211,'索敌增强器',7,'装备',1.0,10.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1998,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93958,'扰断器毛鲁斯级','Disruptor Maulus','Disruptor Maulus','Maulus disruptora','Maulus perturbateur','妨害型マウルス','디스럽터 마울러스','Disruptor Maulus','扰断器毛鲁斯级','这艘毛鲁斯级舰船负责阻止超级集团运输船进入跃迁，迫使它们注定遭受联邦统治的残酷。','type_default.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,135.0,1190000.0,NULL,1,0,1568,'叛道者护卫舰',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,10.0,6.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','任务通用','护卫舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93959,'AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Enemy Point Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Enemy Point Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Enemy Point Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Enemy Point Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Enemy Point Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Enemy Point Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Enemy Point Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Enemy Point Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','AIR Epic Arc - Caldari - Enemy Point Spawner (DO NOT TRANSLATE)','','type_2011_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,0,227,'云状星体',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93960,'米玛塔尔占领的星门','Minmatar Occupied Stargate','Minmatar Occupied Stargate','Portal estelar ocupado por minmatarianos','Portail stellaire occupé minmatar','ミンマター占領スターゲート','민마타 점령당한 스타게이트','Minmatar Occupied Stargate','米玛塔尔占领的星门','这些破旧的走私门由米玛塔尔叛军和许多海盗组织联合建造，提供了在太空外部区域之间快速隐秘穿行的手段。喜爱这些走私门的人通常都无法抵挡帝国空间的诱惑，但又想避免撞上统合部里高度警惕的舰队指挥官员。','type_12292_64.png',NULL,0,100000000.0,NULL,10000.0,1.0e+35,NULL,1,0,319,'大型可撞击的建筑',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','其他','其他','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93963,'“阿厄吉亚”地精灵SW-300','''Aergia'' Hobgoblin SW-300','''Aergia'' Hobgoblin SW-300','Hobgoblin SW-300 Aergia','Hobgoblin ''Aergia'' SW-300','「アエルギア」ホブゴブリンSW-300','''아이르기아'' 홉고블린 SW-300','''Aergia'' Hobgoblin SW-300','“阿厄吉亚”地精灵SW-300','轻型缠绕无人机。由于将适用于舰船的大型缠绕设备安装到可移动、自带动力的小型无人机上存在固有的不稳定性，制造商不得不牺牲了该无人机的部分基础性能。因此，该无人机的信号半径较大，相对容易被锁定和击中，且外壳不够坚固，经不起多次打击。','type_31880_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,3000.0,841,4,0,641,'停滞缠绕无人机',18,'无人机',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,23731,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93998,'联邦海军“银星”磁性力场稳定器','Federation Navy ''Argyreos'' Magnetic Field Stabilizer','Federation Navy ''Argyreos'' Magnetic Field Stabilizer','Estabilizador de campo magnético Argyreos de la Armada de la Federación','Stabilisateur de champ magnétique ''Argyreos'' de la Federation Navy','連邦海軍「アルギュレオス」磁場制御器','연방 해군 ''아르기레오스'' 자기장 안정기','Federation Navy ''Argyreos'' Magnetic Field Stabilizer','联邦海军“银星”磁性力场稳定器','联邦海军“银星”磁性力场稳定器是对标准磁性力场稳定器的特殊改进，加装了指令、控制和交互固件，能够强化无人机和混合炮台。惩罚：在一艘舰船上使用多个这类装备或多个与该装备作用一致的类似装备将削弱实际使用效果。','type_13945_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,648,4,26454,302,'磁场稳定设备',7,'装备',1.0,32.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,9944,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
