INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(94027,'“冥王”原型冰矿采集无人机蓝图箱','Prototype ''Pluto'' Ice Harvesting Drone Blueprint Crate','Prototype ''Pluto'' Ice Harvesting Drone Blueprint Crate','Caja de plano de dron recolector de hielo Pluto prototipo','Caisse de plan de construction Prototype de drone collecteur de glace ''Pluto''','プロトタイプ「プルート」アイス採掘専門ドローン設計図箱','프로토타입 ''플루토'' 아이스 채굴 드론 블루프린트 상자','Контейнер с чертежом прототипа дрона для сбора льда Pluto','“冥王”原型冰矿采集无人机蓝图箱','包含“冥王”原型冰矿采集无人机的5流程蓝图。','type_53532_64.png',NULL,1,1.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,24298,1194,'特别版商品',63,'特别版用品',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(94028,'盖伦特占领的星门','Gallente Occupied Stargate','Gallente Occupied Stargate','Portal estelar ocupado por gallentes','Portail stellaire sous occupation gallente','ガレンテ占領スターゲート','갈란테 점령당한 스타게이트','Gallente Occupied Stargate','盖伦特占领的星门','这些破旧的走私门由米玛塔尔叛军和许多海盗组织联合建造，提供了在太空外部区域之间快速隐秘穿行的手段。喜爱这些走私门的人通常都无法抵挡帝国区域的诱惑，但又想避免撞上统合部里高度警惕的舰队指挥官员。','type_12292_64.png',NULL,0,100000000.0,NULL,10000.0,1.0e+35,NULL,1,0,319,'大型可撞击的建筑',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','其他','其他','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(94029,'加达里占领的星门','Caldari Occupied Stargate','Caldari Occupied Stargate','Portal estelar ocupado por caldaris','Portail stellaire sous occupation caldari','カルダリ占領スターゲート','칼다리 점령당한 스타게이트','Caldari Occupied Stargate','加达里占领的星门','这些破旧的走私门由米玛塔尔叛军和许多海盗组织联合建造，提供了在太空外部区域之间快速隐秘穿行的手段。喜爱这些走私门的人通常都无法抵挡帝国区域的诱惑，但又想避免撞上统合部里高度警惕的舰队指挥官员。','type_12292_64.png',NULL,0,100000000.0,NULL,10000.0,1.0e+35,NULL,1,0,319,'大型可撞击的建筑',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','其他','其他','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(94030,'艾玛占领的星门','Amarr Occupied Stargate','Amarr Occupied Stargate','Portal estelar ocupado por amarrianos','Portail stellaire sous occupation amarr','アマー占領スターゲート','아마르 점령당한 스타게이트','Amarr Occupied Stargate','艾玛占领的星门','这些破旧的走私门由米玛塔尔叛军和许多海盗组织联合建造，提供了在太空外部区域之间快速隐秘穿行的手段。喜爱这些走私门的人通常都无法抵挡帝国区域的诱惑，但又想避免撞上统合部里高度警惕的舰队指挥官员。','type_12292_64.png',NULL,0,100000000.0,NULL,10000.0,1.0e+35,NULL,1,0,319,'大型可撞击的建筑',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','其他','其他','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(94031,'小行星套件1大型3灼烧岩','Asteroid Set 1 Large 3 Scordite','Asteroid Set 1 Large 3 Scordite','Conjunto de asteroides 1 grande 3 de escordita','Ensemble d''astéroïdes 1 grand 3 scordite','アステロイドセット1 大型 3 スコダイト','소행성 세트 1 대형 3 스코다이트','Asteroid Set 1 Large 3 Scordite','小行星套件1大型3灼烧岩','','type_default.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,0,1975,'不可交互物品',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
UPDATE types SET description='随着战争之路冲突席卷艾玛帝国，女皇凯蒂兹一世向所有信仰捍卫者发出号召。艾玛达特统区响应了号召，派遣他们最专业的飞行员对抗入侵者。他们用经文装饰自己的舰船，并发誓为神圣使命献出生命。这些飞行员无与伦比的技能和坚定不移的奉献精神为艾玛达特统区赢得了整个帝国的赞誉。' WHERE type_id=94032;

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(94058,'帝国海军“新手”散热槽','Imperial Navy ''Neophyte'' Heat Sink','Imperial Navy ''Neophyte'' Heat Sink','Disipador de calor Neophyte de la Armada Imperial','Dissipateur thermique ''Neophyte'' de l''Imperial Navy','帝国海軍「ネオファイト」放熱機','제국 해군 ''네오파이트'' 방열판','Imperial Navy ''Neophyte'' Heat Sink','帝国海军“新手”散热槽','帝国海军“新手”散热槽是对标准散热槽的特殊改进，加装了指令、控制和交互固件，能够强化无人机和能量炮台。惩罚：在一艘舰船上使用多个这类装备或多个与该装备作用一致的类似装备将削弱实际使用效果。','type_13941_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,647,4,26453,205,'散热槽',7,'装备',1.0,32.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,2363,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(94060,'帝国海军“门徒”散热槽','Imperial Navy ''Disciple'' Heat Sink','Imperial Navy ''Disciple'' Heat Sink','Disipador de calor Disciple de la Armada Imperial','Dissipateur thermique ''Disciple'' de l''Imperial Navy','帝国海軍「ディサイプル」放熱機','제국 해군 ''디사이플'' 방열판','Imperial Navy ''Disciple'' Heat Sink','帝国海军“门徒”散热槽','帝国海军“门徒”散热槽是对标准散热槽的特殊改进，加装了指令、控制和交互固件，能够强化无人机和能量炮台。惩罚：在一艘舰船上使用多个这类装备或多个与该装备作用一致的类似装备将削弱实际使用效果。','type_13941_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,647,4,26453,205,'散热槽',7,'装备',1.0,37.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,2363,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(94063,'加达里海军导弹制导计算机','Caldari Navy Missile Guidance Computer','Caldari Navy Missile Guidance Computer','Intensificador de guiado de misiles de la Armada Caldari','Ordinateur de guidage de missiles de la Caldari Navy','カルダリ海軍ミサイル誘導コンピューター','칼다리 해군 미사일 유도 컴퓨터','Caldari Navy Missile Guidance Computer','加达里海军导弹制导计算机','它能通过预测目标的轨迹来提升导弹的精准度和射程。该装备可与脚本合用来提升其在某些方面的效果。惩罚：在一艘舰船上使用多个这类装备或多个与该装备作用一致的类似装备将削弱实际使用效果。','type_94063_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,1.0,NULL,2032,4,21437,1396,'导弹制导计算机',7,'装备',1.0,28.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,35788,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(94064,'共和舰队导弹制导计算机','Republic Fleet Missile Guidance Computer','Republic Fleet Missile Guidance Computer','Intensificador de guiado de misiles de la Flota de la República','Ordinateur de guidage de missiles de la Flotte de la République','共和国海軍ミサイル誘導コンピューター','공화국 함대 미사일 유도 컴퓨터','Republic Fleet Missile Guidance Computer','共和舰队导弹制导计算机','它能通过预测目标的轨迹来提升导弹的精准度和射程。该装备可与脚本合用来提升其在某些方面的效果。惩罚：在一艘舰船上使用多个这类装备或多个与该装备作用一致的类似装备将削弱实际使用效果。','type_94063_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,1.0,NULL,2032,4,21437,1396,'导弹制导计算机',7,'装备',1.0,28.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,35788,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(94065,'共和舰队采矿调查芯片组','Republic Fleet Mining Survey Chipset','Republic Fleet Mining Survey Chipset','Chipset de prospección de minería de la Flota de la República','Puce d''arpentage d''extraction minière de la Flotte de la République','共和国海軍採掘調査用チップセット','공화국 함대 채굴 조사 칩셋','Republic Fleet Mining Survey Chipset','共和舰队采矿调查芯片组','用于采矿舰船集成采矿勘测仪的升级芯片组，可提供更详尽的小行星信息，提高获得最佳采矿产物的几率。提高采矿激光器和冰块采集器的暴击成功率和暴击成功加成收益。降低采矿激光器、冰块收集器和气体云收集器残留物的概率。通过添加已扫描小行星中剩余矿石量的相关信息，增强当前采矿舰船上的集成采矿勘测仪。','type_94065_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,714,4,2732,49,'采矿调查芯片组',7,'装备',1.0,10.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,444,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(94067,'加达里海军信号畸变放大器','Caldari Navy Signal Distortion Amplifier','Caldari Navy Signal Distortion Amplifier','Amplificador de distorsión de señales de la Armada Caldari','Amplificateur de distorsion de signal de la Caldari Navy','カルダリ海軍のシグナル歪曲率増幅器','칼다리 해군 신호 교란 증폭기','Caldari Navy Signal Distortion Amplifier','加达里海军信号畸变放大器','增强常规ECM目标干扰装备的运行效能，使之效果更强，作用距离更远。只适用于常规ECM类装备，不适用于ECM脉冲波类装备。惩罚：在一艘舰船上使用多个这类装备或多个与该装备作用一致的类似装备将削弱实际使用效果。','type_85006_64.png',NULL,1,5.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,967,4,1046,514,'ECM稳定设备',7,'装备',1.0,25.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,25561,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

||'The digital sequence of this pattern license has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this pattern you must provide Alignment Sequencer to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing.','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.1,NULL,NULL,NULL,3633,1,27475,4726,'舰船涂装设计元素',2118,'个性化定制',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

||'The digital sequence of this pattern license has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this pattern you must provide Alignment Sequencer to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing.','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.1,NULL,NULL,NULL,3633,1,27481,4726,'舰船涂装设计元素',2118,'个性化定制',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

UPDATE types SET name='龙骑兵级海军型蓝图箱', es_name='Caja de plano de la Dragoon modelo de la Armada', fr_name='Caisse de plan de construction de Dragoon Navy Issue', ja_name='ドラグーン海軍仕様設計図箱', ko_name='드라군 해군 에디션 블루프린트 상자', zh_name='龙骑兵级海军型蓝图箱', description='包含一份龙骑兵级海军型蓝图拷贝，限使用一次。' WHERE type_id=94312;
UPDATE types SET name='渡鸦级海军型蓝图箱', es_name='Caja de plano de la Corax modelo de la Armada', fr_name='Caisse de plan de construction de Corax Navy Issue', ja_name='コラックス海軍仕様設計図箱', ko_name='코락스 해군 에디션 블루프린트 상자', zh_name='渡鸦级海军型蓝图箱' WHERE type_id=94314;
UPDATE types SET name='阿尔格斯级海军型蓝图箱', es_name='Caja de plano de la Algos modelo de la Armada', fr_name='Caisse de plan de construction d''Algos Navy Issue', ja_name='アルゴス海軍仕様設計図箱', ko_name='알고스 해군 에디션 블루프린트 상자', zh_name='阿尔格斯级海军型蓝图箱', description='包含一份阿尔格斯级海军型蓝图拷贝，限使用一次。' WHERE type_id=94315;

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(95173,'嫌犯侦察海军军事信标','Suspect Scout Navy Military Beacon','Suspect Scout Navy Military Beacon','Baliza militar de reconocimiento de la Armada sospechosa','Balise militaire d''éclaireur Navy suspecte','容疑者偵察用海軍軍事ビーコン','용의자 정찰 해군 군사 비컨','Suspect Scout Navy Military Beacon','嫌犯侦察海军军事信标','这个信标标志着一处侦察站军事设施。入口通道设定为可通行一级科技和船型等同于护卫舰的帝国势力海军舰船。安装在这个加速轨道中的安全设备会阻止任何舰船使用装配的跃迁核心稳定器。此外，激活加速轨道的所有克隆飞行员都将触发嫌犯计时器。','type_2335_64.png',NULL,0,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,NULL,1,0,310,'信标',2,'天体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(95191,'开拓者级新手箱','Pioneer Starter Crate','Pioneer Starter Crate','Caja de principiante para la Pioneer','Caisse de démarrage Pioneer','パイオニア用スタータークレート','파이오니어 스타터 상자','Pioneer Starter Crate','开拓者级新手箱','此物品无法在市场中交易。','type_63772_64.png',NULL,0,4.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,25330,1194,'特别版商品',63,'特别版用品',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(95192,'开拓者级','Pioneer','Pioneer','Pioneer','Pioneer','パイオニア','파이오니어','Pioneer','开拓者级','<font size="14"><b>开拓者级专家系统</b></font>使用该专家系统提供的技能，克隆飞行员可以驾驶开拓者级采矿驱逐舰。<b>这个专家系统提供的技能持续7天。</b>专家系统是一种远程受限人工智能，可在租赁有效期内为你提供访问特定技能的权限。专家系统不依托于克隆体和太空舱，因此处于有效期内的专家系统在太空舱损毁或进行远距克隆时也能继续使用。<font size="14"><b>启用专家系统</b></font>克隆飞行员兑换此物品后就会自动启用专家系统。<i>专家系统由PKN星际财团研发，由财团下属军团通过超光速网络通信来进行推广。专家系统是一种基于虚拟大脑技术的受限人工智能。专家系统使用了通过技能训练或技能注入产生的神经通路，与太空舱界面和控制系统兼容。通过PKN星际集团超网上的专用超光速频道可以实现实时指令和控制通信。</i>','type_57207_64.png',NULL,0,1.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,NULL,1,24602,4091,'标准专家系统',2100,'专家系统',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(95193,'帝国增效剂箱III','Empire Booster Crate III','Empire Booster Crate III','Caja de potenciadores del Imperio III','Caisse de booster impérial III','帝国ブースター箱III','제국 부스터 상자 III','Empire Booster Crate III','帝国增效剂箱III','打开后，你将收到一份以下类型的种族增效剂：避难所增效剂III、竞技场增效剂III、自由区增效剂III和斯托卡增效剂III','type_60096_64.png',NULL,0,0.1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,24820,1194,'特别版商品',63,'特别版用品',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(95274,'Exordium Filament','Exordium Filament','Exordium Filament','Exordium Filament','Exordium Filament','Exordium Filament','Exordium Filament','Exordium Filament','Exordium Filament','Once activated, the Exordium Filament instantly transports a capsuleer from <b>High Security Space</b> to a system in the Exordium region.'||X'0a0a'
||'This filament can only be activated by capsuleers <b>under 35 days old</b> with <b>2 million or fewer</b> skill points.'||X'0a0a'
||'AIR has issued this filament to celebrate the opening of Exordium, a region dedicated to new pilots. With CONCORD’s protection and AIR’s guidance, capsuleers in Exordium can learn the skills they need to face the threats of wider New Eden, and earn the rewards they offer.','type_79996_64.png',NULL,1,0.1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,26016,4041,'跳跃纤维',17,'常用物品',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(95292,'Hecate Presidential Agent SKIN','Hecate Presidential Agent SKIN','Hecate Presidential Agent SKIN','Hecate Presidential Agent SKIN','Hecate Presidential Agent SKIN','Hecate Presidential Agent SKIN','Hecate Presidential Agent SKIN','Hecate Presidential Agent SKIN','Hecate Presidential Agent SKIN','Formed by Presidential decree during the first days of the Warpath Conflict, the Special Presidential Agents are a unique military unit of independently operating special agents given total autonomy over their actions. They answer directly to the president, and their primary mission directive is to disrupt the Caldari operations by any means necessary.','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,2356,17,0,1950,'永久涂装',91,'涂装',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

The Amattar Mandate answered that call, sending their most expert pilots to fight against the invaders. They adorned their vessels with scripture and pledged their lives to their holy mission. The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire.','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,3497,17,0,1950,'永久涂装',91,'涂装',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

These strategies provide the basis for a Starkmanir Strategic wing, a small force of extremely effective Starkmanir pilots that came together in response to the Warpath Conflict. Famed for their ability to establish tactical superiority even against much larger enemy fleets, the Warpath Stark are often underestimated but never outclassed.','type_default.png',NULL,1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,3497,17,0,1950,'永久涂装',91,'涂装',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
